12-gauge-buckshot.name: 12 Gauge Buckshot
12-gauge-buckshot.description: 12 Gauge Buckshot: Standard shotgun ammunition. Used by Pump Shotgun, Double Barrel, SPAS-12, and M4 Shotgun. RustLab.

12-gauge-incendiary-shell.name: 12 Gauge Incendiary Shell
12-gauge-incendiary-shell.description: 12 Gauge Incendiary Shell: Incendiary shotgun ammo that sets targets on fire on impact. RustLab.

12-gauge-slug.name: 12 Gauge Slug
12-gauge-slug.description: 12 Gauge Slug: Single large projectile for a shotgun. Higher range and accuracy than buckshot. RustLab.

2-module-car.name: 2 Module Car
2-module-car.description: A 2-module modular vehicle frame. Build and customize with interchangeable vehicle modules.

3-module-car.name: 3 Module Car
3-module-car.description: A 3-module modular vehicle frame. Build and customize with interchangeable vehicle modules.

4-module-car.name: 4 Module Car
4-module-car.description: A 4-module modular vehicle frame. Build and customize with interchangeable vehicle modules.

40mm-he-grenade.name: 40mm HE Grenade
40mm-he-grenade.description: 40mm HE Grenade: High explosive ammo for the Multiple Grenade Launcher. Heavy area damage. RustLab.

40mm-shotgun-round.name: 40mm Shotgun Round
40mm-shotgun-round.description: 40mm Shotgun Round: Buckshot ammo for the Multiple Grenade Launcher. Short range spread fire. RustLab.

40mm-smoke-grenade.name: 40mm Smoke Grenade
40mm-smoke-grenade.description: 40mm Smoke Grenade: Smoke ammo for the Multiple Grenade Launcher. Creates vision-blocking smoke clouds. RustLab.

50cal.name: #50cal
50cal.description: 50 Caliber Rifle — a powerful long-range sniper rifle with extreme damage. Crafting, ammo & recycle. RustLab.

556-rifle-ammo.name: 5.56 Rifle Ammo
556-rifle-ammo.description: Ammunition for a Rifle. Loses velocity when fired over long distances resulting in slightly decreased damage.

a-barrel-costume.name: A Barrel Costume
a-barrel-costume.description: A stupid barrel costume, so you can hide like a pro..p

above-ground-pool.name: Above Ground Pool
above-ground-pool.description: A large wooden pool that can be filled with water.

abyss-assault-rifle.name: Abyss Assault Rifle
abyss-assault-rifle.description: A waterlogged assault rifle from the abyss

abyss-horizontal-storage-tank.name: Abyss Horizontal Storage Tank
abyss-horizontal-storage-tank.description: Horizontal Abyss container taken from the depths of the ocean

abyss-metal-hatchet.name: Abyss Metal Hatchet
abyss-metal-hatchet.description: Metal hatchet, reclaimed from the abyss, perfect for survival and crafting

abyss-metal-pickaxe.name: Abyss Metal Pickaxe
abyss-metal-pickaxe.description: Plucked from the abyss, this Metal Pickaxe is a prized possession for any survivor

abyss-pack.name: Abyss Pack
abyss-pack.description: A damaged deep-water survival suit found in the abyss. No longer serves its original purpose but functions as a cosmetic wearable.

abyss-torch.name: Abyss Torch
abyss-torch.description: Illuminate the underwater depths with this durable and waterproof diving torch

abyss-vertical-storage-tank.name: Abyss Vertical Storage Tank
abyss-vertical-storage-tank.description: Vertical Abyss container taken from the depths of the ocean

acoustic-guitar.name: Acoustic Guitar
acoustic-guitar.description: A classic acoustic guitar, built for jam sessions around campfires at night.

advanced-anti-rad-tea.name: Advanced Anti-Rad Tea
advanced-anti-rad-tea.description: An advanced tea that provides some hydration and temporarily increases your resistance to radiation a moderate amount.

advanced-blueprint-fragment.name: Advanced Blueprint Fragment
advanced-blueprint-fragment.description: Precision schematics with complex information, multiple fragments are necessary for crafting a Tier 3 Workbench.

advanced-cooling-tea.name: Advanced Cooling Tea
advanced-cooling-tea.description: An advanced cooling tea, provides hydration and temporarily decreases your max and core temperature.

advanced-crafting-quality-tea.name: Advanced Crafting Quality Tea
advanced-crafting-quality-tea.description: An advanced crafting tea, provides hydration and temporarily increases the chances of a higher quality crafting outcome.

advanced-harvesting-tea.name: Advanced Harvesting Tea
advanced-harvesting-tea.description: An advanced harvesting tea, provides hydration and temporarily boosts the amount of resources you receive from harvesting corpses a moderate amount.

advanced-healing-tea.name: Advanced Healing Tea
advanced-healing-tea.description: An advanced healing tea, provides hydration and heals you a moderate amount over time.

advanced-max-health-tea.name: Advanced Max Health Tea
advanced-max-health-tea.description: An advanced health tea, provides hydration and temporarily boosts maximum health a moderate amount.

advanced-ore-tea.name: Advanced Ore Tea
advanced-ore-tea.description: An advanced ore tea, provides hydration and temporarily increases your yield from ores a moderate amount.

advanced-rad-removal-tea.name: Advanced Rad. Removal Tea
advanced-rad-removal-tea.description: A tea that removes some radiation.

advanced-scrap-tea.name: Advanced Scrap Tea
advanced-scrap-tea.description: An advanced scrap tea, temporarily increases the amount of scrap you receive from barrels a moderate amount.

advanced-warming-tea.name: Advanced Warming Tea
advanced-warming-tea.description: An advanced warming tea that temporarily increases both your core and minimum temperature.

advanced-wood-tea.name: Advanced Wood Tea
advanced-wood-tea.description: An advanced wood tea, temporarily increases the yield from cutting trees a moderate amount.

advent-calendar.name: Advent Calendar
advent-calendar.description: Receive a special gift each and every day!

anchor.name: Anchor
anchor.description: A heavy anchor to stop your boat drifting.

anchovy.name: Anchovy
anchovy.description: A small bony fish commonly found in large schools.

and-switch.name: AND Switch
and-switch.description: Outputs power only when both of its two inputs are simultaneously receiving power. A fundamental logic gate used to require multiple conditions to be met before triggering an output.

animal-fat.name: Animal Fat
animal-fat.description: Harvested from animals, combine with cloth to create a low quality fuel source.

anti-radiation-pills.name: Anti-Radiation Pills
anti-radiation-pills.description: Taking these pills will lower your radiation level. WARNING: May cause extreme dehydration.

apple.name: Apple
apple.description: An Apple. Eating it provides a small boost to health, hunger, and thirst.

apple-pie.name: Apple Pie
apple-pie.description: A delicious apple pie that provides a boost to hunger, health and hydration. Grants better night vision and temporary cold resistance.

arctic-scientist-suit.name: Arctic Scientist Suit
arctic-scientist-suit.description: A hazmat suit made from radiation resistant rubber.

arctic-suit.name: Arctic Suit
arctic-suit.description: An arctic variant of the hazmat suit which trades radiation for cold protection.

armored-cockpit-vehicle-module.name: Armored Cockpit Vehicle Module
armored-cockpit-vehicle-module.description: Single module armored cockpit for a driver and one passenger.

armored-passenger-vehicle-module.name: Armored Passenger Vehicle Module
armored-passenger-vehicle-module.description: Single module armored seating for two passengers.

artist-canvas-large.name: Artist Canvas Large
artist-canvas-large.description: A large sized canvas for seamless murals

artist-canvas-medium.name: Artist Canvas Medium
artist-canvas-medium.description: A medium canvas for seamless murals

artist-canvas-small.name: Artist Canvas Small
artist-canvas-small.description: A small canvas for seamless murals

artist-canvas-standing.name: Artist Canvas Standing
artist-canvas-standing.description: A standing canvas for seamless murals

artist-canvas-xl.name: Artist Canvas XL
artist-canvas-xl.description: An extra large canvas for seamless murals

artist-canvas-xxl.name: Artist Canvas XXL
artist-canvas-xxl.description: An extra, extra large canvas for seamless murals

asbestos-armor-insert.name: Asbestos Armor Insert
asbestos-armor-insert.description: Asbestos insert providing extra protection from heat for crafted clothes and armor.

assault-rifle.name: Assault Rifle
assault-rifle.description: The iconic assault rifle. High damage and fire rate but significant recoil demands skill.

attack-helicopter.name: Attack Helicopter
attack-helicopter.description: A fairly solid helicopter with weapons capability.

audio-alarm.name: Audio Alarm
audio-alarm.description: A speaker which will emit a loud warning alarm when powered

auto-turret.name: Auto Turret
auto-turret.description: A powered automated defense turret that detects and fires upon unauthorized players within range. Requires authorization from the TC-linked player list to avoid being targeted.

ballista.name: Ballista
ballista.description: A stationary ballista, perfect for defence. Can fire deadly bolts at distant targets.

bamboo-barrel.name: Bamboo Barrel
bamboo-barrel.description: Keep your things in this bamboo barrel. Stores up to 48 items. Cannot be locked.

bandage.name: Bandage
bandage.description: A basic cloth bandage that instantly restores a small amount of health and stops bleeding. The cheapest and most accessible medical item in the game — always carry a stack.

bandana-mask.name: Bandana Mask
bandana-mask.description: A square of cloth which is tied around the face over the nose and mouth.

barbeque.name: Barbeque
barbeque.description: A makeshift Barbeque. You can cook significant amounts of food with this.

baseball-bat.name: Baseball Bat
baseball-bat.description: A baseball bat wrapped in barbed wire

baseball-cap.name: Baseball Cap
baseball-cap.description: Simple hat for your head. Offers basic protection from damage and the cold.

basic-anti-rad-tea.name: Basic Anti-Rad Tea
basic-anti-rad-tea.description: A basic tea that provides hydration and temporarily increases your resistance to radiation a small amount.

basic-blueprint-fragment.name: Basic Blueprint Fragment
basic-blueprint-fragment.description: Damaged diagrams containing partial information to construct a Tier 2 Workbench. Combine several fragments to complete the full blueprint.

basic-cooling-tea.name: Basic Cooling Tea
basic-cooling-tea.description: A basic cooling tea that temporarily decreases your max and core temperature.

basic-crafting-quality-tea.name: Basic Crafting Quality Tea
basic-crafting-quality-tea.description: A basic crafting tea. provides hydration and increases the chances of a higher quality crafting outcome for a short time.

basic-harvesting-tea.name: Basic Harvesting Tea
basic-harvesting-tea.description: A basic harvesting tea, provides hydration and temporarily increases the amount of resources you receive from harvesting corpses a small amount.

basic-healing-tea.name: Basic Healing Tea
basic-healing-tea.description: A basic healing tea, provides hydration and heals you a small amount over time.

basic-horse-shoes.name: Basic Horse Shoes
basic-horse-shoes.description: Equipping these horse shoes will grant your horse additional movement speed

basic-max-health-tea.name: Basic Max Health Tea
basic-max-health-tea.description: A basic health tea, provides hydration and temporarily boosts maximum health a small amount.

basic-ore-tea.name: Basic Ore Tea
basic-ore-tea.description: A basic ore tea, provides hydration and temporarily increases your yield from harvesting ores a small amount.

basic-scrap-tea.name: Basic Scrap Tea
basic-scrap-tea.description: A basic scrap tea, temporarily increases the amount of scrap you receive from barrels a small amount.

basic-warming-tea.name: Basic Warming Tea
basic-warming-tea.description: A basic warming tea that temporarily increases both your core and minimum temperature.

basic-wood-tea.name: Basic Wood Tea
basic-wood-tea.description: A basic wood tea, temporarily increases the yield from cutting trees a small amount.

bath-tub-planter.name: Bath Tub Planter
bath-tub-planter.description: A small planter with enough room to plant 3 seeds.

battering-ram.name: Battering Ram
battering-ram.description: A reinforced siege weapon built for smashing through wooden and stone constructions with brute force. Must be repaired between uses.

battery-small.name: Small Rechargeable Battery
battery-small.description: A small battery that stores electrical energy and can output up to 100W. Charges from any power source and discharges to power connected components when the primary source fails.

beach-chair.name: Beach Chair
beach-chair.description: The Beach Chair is the best way to relax, whether it's by the pool or on the beach.

beach-parasol.name: Beach Parasol
beach-parasol.description: A large umbrella that will shield you from the sun.

beach-table.name: Beach Table
beach-table.description: A small table to hold your drinks while relaxing.

beach-towel.name: Beach Towel
beach-towel.description: A colourful beach towel. Placing this will give you a location to respawn.

beancan-grenade.name: Beancan Grenade
beancan-grenade.description: An unreliable explosive grenade. Each one has a different length fuse, so you might lose some fingers. Can be used to make satchel charges.

bear-pie.name: Bear Pie
bear-pie.description: A pie made of bear meat, provides a boost to hunger, health and hydration. Increases effect of harvesting teas but reduces their duration.

bear-skin-rug.name: Bear Skin Rug
bear-skin-rug.description: A decorative rug that can be placed on walls, floors, and ceilings. Provides comfort when in close proximity.

bed.name: Bed
bed.description: A Bed. Placing this will give you a place to respawn and can be used much more frequently than a sleeping bag. Note: Must be placed inside a building.

bee-catapult-bomb.name: Bee Catapult Bomb
bee-catapult-bomb.description: A bunch of Bee Grenades in a single catapult projectile. Creates swarms of Bees on impact.

bee-grenade.name: Bee Grenade
bee-grenade.description: A fragile glass jar full of bees. Breaking upon impact, the bees will find the nearest player to attack. Careful where you throw it!

beehive-nucleus.name: Beehive Nucleus
beehive-nucleus.description: The heart of any hive, needed for raising bees. Produce honeycomb from happy bees to grow the nucleus and increase yields.

beenie-hat.name: Beenie Hat
beenie-hat.description: A wooly hat, offering some basic protection from damage and cold for your head.

bicycle.name: Bicycle
bicycle.description: A pedal bicycle. Requires no fuel and is quiet — good for stealthy travel across the map.

big-cat-pie.name: Big Cat Pie
big-cat-pie.description: A pie made from jungle cat meat, purrfect temperature. Boosts hunger, health and hydration. Shows nearby animal tracks for a short time.

binoculars.name: Binoculars
binoculars.description: Binoculars allowing you to see objects at great length.

birthday-cake.name: Birthday Cake
birthday-cake.description: A very special and happy birthday to Rust!

birthday-candle-hat.name: Birthday Candle Hat
birthday-candle-hat.description: A hat with a birthday candle on top. You can turn the candle on in your inventory.

black-berry-clone.name: Black Berry Clone
black-berry-clone.description: A clipping of a Black Berry Plant.

black-berry-seed.name: Black Berry Seed
black-berry-seed.description: Black Berry Seeds can be planted in the ground or a planter box to grow additional food. Watering with large quantities of water speeds up growth.

black-raspberries.name: Black Raspberries
black-raspberries.description: Black Raspberries picked from berry bushes. Eating it provides a small boost to health, hunger, and thirst.

bleach.name: Bleach
bleach.description: A powerful oxidizing agent. Can be used as a disinfectant.

blocker.name: Blocker
blocker.description: Passes power from POWER IN to POWER OUT only when there is no signal on the BLOCK input. If the BLOCK input receives power, the output is cut off.

blow-pipe.name: Blow Pipe
blow-pipe.description: A blown weapon that fires darts with different effects.

blue-berry.name: Blue Berry
blue-berry.description: A blue berry. Can be eaten or used in mixing table recipes to create teas.

blue-berry-clone.name: Blue Berry Clone
blue-berry-clone.description: A clipping of a Blue Berry Plant.

blue-berry-seed.name: Blue Berry Seed
blue-berry-seed.description: Blue Berry Seeds can be planted in the ground or a planter box to grow additional food. Watering with large quantities of water speeds up growth.

blue-boomer.name: Blue Boomer
blue-boomer.description: A very large mortar type firework with a blue starburst

blue-keycard.name: Blue Keycard
blue-keycard.description: A keycard with medium level clearance.

blue-roman-candle.name: Blue Roman Candle
blue-roman-candle.description: A small repeating firework, shoots a series of Blue balls into the air

blueberries.name: Blueberries
blueberries.description: Blueberries picked from berry bushes. Eating it provides a small boost to health, hunger, and thirst.

blueprint.name: Blueprint
blueprint.description: A learned blueprint that allows you to craft the corresponding item at the required workbench tier.

blunderbuss.name: Blunderbuss
blunderbuss.description: A Shotgun with two barrels allowing two shots to be fired in quick succession before needing to reload.

boat-building-station.name: Boat Building Station
boat-building-station.description: A deployable building station, creates a stable workspace on the water to build or edit your floating wooden refuge.

bolt-action-rifle.name: Bolt Action Rifle
bolt-action-rifle.description: Long-range precision rifle. Devastating at range with high velocity and accuracy.

bone-armor.name: Bone Armor
bone-armor.description: A primitive suit of armor made of bones, weak protection from damage and the elements but better than nothing.

bone-arrow.name: Bone Arrow
bone-arrow.description: An Arrow equipped with a large bone arrowhead making it very easy to hit targets at the expense of damage

bone-club.name: Bone Club
bone-club.description: A blunt weapon made from a femur. All around basic gathering tool.

bone-fragments.name: Bone Fragments
bone-fragments.description: Harvested from animal carcasses after hunting. Used in crafting bone-based tools and arrows, and as an ingredient in some bone armor pieces.

bone-helmet.name: Bone Helmet
bone-helmet.description: A primitive helmet made from bone. Moderate protection from projectiles and melee damage.

bone-knife.name: Bone Knife
bone-knife.description: Melee weapon crafted from bone fragments. Good for harvesting carcases.

boogie-board.name: Boogie Board
boogie-board.description: Use the boogie board to catch some sick waves.

boom-box.name: Boom Box
boom-box.description: A large speaker to play recorded cassette tapes which can also stream audio from the internet. Open the settings to change audio options.

boomerang.name: Boomerang
boomerang.description: Can be used a melee weapon or as a throwable. Once thrown (with right click) it travels in an arc before coming back to you.

boonie-hat.name: Boonie Hat
boonie-hat.description: A boonie hat, offering minor protection from damage and cold for your head.

boots.name: Boots
boots.description: Sturdy work boots to keep your toes safe, you'd feel nothing if you kicked a table leg. Strong protection against the cold and incoming damage.

bota-bag.name: Bota Bag
bota-bag.description: A canteen used to carry Water. Left click to drink, right click to fill from water sources, or to pour out.

bread-loaf.name: Bread Loaf
bread-loaf.description: A loaf of bread that provides a boost to health, hunger and hydration. Can also be fed to a horse for a boost to its stats.

bronze-egg.name: Bronze Egg
bronze-egg.description: A Bronze Egg. Open for a surprise or collect 10 to upgrade to a silver egg.

bucket-helmet.name: Bucket Helmet
bucket-helmet.description: A Bucket Helmet. It provides a level of regional protection from inflicted damage.

bulb-string-lights.name: Bulb String Lights
bulb-string-lights.description: A string of glowing bulbs, can be deployed point by point to light up your base.

bunny-ears.name: Bunny Ears
bunny-ears.description: Bunny Ears. Grants additional Egg Vision allowing you to detect more eggs during an Easter egg hunt.

bunny-hat.name: Bunny Hat
bunny-hat.description: A silly Bunny Hat with wobbly ears to celebrate Easter 2021

bunny-onesie.name: Bunny Onesie
bunny-onesie.description: A Bunny Onesie. Grants additional Egg Vision allowing you to detect more eggs during an Easter egg hunt.

burlap-gloves.name: Burlap Gloves
burlap-gloves.description: Basic burlap gloves, offering protection from the elements

burlap-headwrap.name: Burlap Headwrap
burlap-headwrap.description: A Headwrap made out of burlap.

burlap-shirt.name: Burlap Shirt
burlap-shirt.description: A Shirt made out of burlap.

burnt-bear-meat.name: Burnt Bear Meat
burnt-bear-meat.description: Bear Meat that has been overcooked.

burnt-chicken.name: Burnt Chicken
burnt-chicken.description: Burned chicken. Eating it will damage your health.

burnt-deer-meat.name: Burnt Deer Meat
burnt-deer-meat.description: Burned Deer Meat. Eating it will damage your health.

burnt-horse-meat.name: Burnt Horse Meat
burnt-horse-meat.description: Burned horse meat. Eating it will damage your health.

burnt-human-meat.name: Burnt Human Meat
burnt-human-meat.description: Burned Meat from a human being. Consuming will damage your health.

burnt-pork.name: Burnt Pork
burnt-pork.description: This little piggy has been in the oven for too long.

burnt-wolf-meat.name: Burnt Wolf Meat
burnt-wolf-meat.description: Spoiled Wolf Meat. Consuming will damage your health.

burst-module.name: Burst Module
burst-module.description: A weapon attachment that modifies recoil and rate of fire. Allows weapon to fire in 3 round bursts when turned on. Use [+firemode] to toggle on or off.

butcher-knife.name: Butcher Knife
butcher-knife.description: A sharp butcher knife. Extremely good at harvesting flesh from both dead or alive bodies.

cable-tunnel.name: Cable Tunnel
cable-tunnel.description: Allows you to pass a cable through a wall. Each input will forward the amount it receives to the corresponding output on the other side.

caboose.name: Caboose
caboose.description: A train caboose car that runs on the underground rail system. Attach it to a locomotive for scenic travel beneath the map.

cactus-flesh.name: Cactus Flesh
cactus-flesh.description: Flesh of a Cactus, contains water.

camera.name: Camera
camera.description: A camera. Take screenshots with primary fire, zoom in and out with secondary fire, and lock focus with third fire.

camp-fire.name: Camp Fire
camp-fire.description: A small camp fire. Provides warmth and light, and you can cook with it.

camper-vehicle-module.name: Camper Vehicle Module
camper-vehicle-module.description: Dual module camper that allows up to 4 players to respawn. Also includes a barbecue, a locker and a small box for item storage.

can-of-beans.name: Can of Beans
can-of-beans.description: Beans found as loot. Eating it provides a small boost to health, hunger, and thirst.

can-of-tuna.name: Can of Tuna
can-of-tuna.description: Chunked tuna found as loot. Eating it provides a small boost to health, hunger, and thirst.

canbourine.name: Canbourine
canbourine.description: A selection of crumpled cans assembled into a ring to produce some great background percussion.

cancer-research-uk-plushie.name: Cancer Research UK Plushie
cancer-research-uk-plushie.description: A soft and squishy plush sold on the Rust store in October 2025 to support Cancer Research UK, helping fund real-world cancer research.

candle-hat.name: Candle Hat
candle-hat.description: A hat with a candle on top. You can turn the candle on in your inventory.

candy-cane.name: Candy Cane
candy-cane.description: A very old candy cane from 2014

candy-cane-club.name: Candy Cane Club
candy-cane-club.description: Smash some faces with this large piece of candy

cannon.name: Cannon
cannon.description: A heavy mountable cannon for your boat with a short fuse. Questionable accuracy but high damage.

cannonball.name: Cannonball
cannonball.description: Cannonball: Solid iron ammo for the Mounted Cannon. Deals heavy kinetic damage to structures and players. RustLab.

captains-log.name: Captain's Log
captains-log.description: A deteriorating piece of paper with information relating to the last moments of this vessel.

car-radio.name: Car Radio
car-radio.description: A small radio to use in cars. Will only work while the car is turned on.

card-table.name: Card Table
card-table.description: A table for playing card games

carvable-pumpkin.name: Carvable Pumpkin
carvable-pumpkin.description: A pumpkin you can carve any design you'd like into and light up at night. Requires wood as a fuel source.

cassette-long.name: Cassette - Long
cassette-long.description: A tape that you can record audio on to using a Cassette Recorder. Stores up to 30s of audio.

cassette-medium.name: Cassette - Medium
cassette-medium.description: A tape that you can record audio on to using a Cassette Recorder. Stores up to 20s of audio.

cassette-recorder.name: Cassette Recorder
cassette-recorder.description: Insert a cassette and play the recorded audio with [attack], [attack2] to record new audio and [+reload] to throw.

cassette-short.name: Cassette - Short
cassette-short.description: A tape that you can record audio on to using a Cassette Recorder. Stores up to 10s of audio.

catapult.name: Catapult
catapult.description: An improvised catapult siege weapon. Built for flinging destructive projectiles with questionable accuracy. Can be towed by horses.

catfish.name: Catfish
catfish.description: A large, whiskered fresh water based predator. Eats everything, so you never know what you'll find in it's stomach.

cctv-camera.name: CCTV Camera
cctv-camera.description: A wall-mounted security camera that can be viewed remotely through a Computer Station. Assign it a custom identifier and monitor it from anywhere in your base.

ceiling-light.name: Ceiling Light
ceiling-light.description: A powered overhead light that illuminates a room when switched on. An efficient way to light up your base without consuming Low Grade Fuel.

chainsaw.name: Chainsaw
chainsaw.description: A Chainsaw. Very effective at cutting trees in addition to soft fleshy objects. Requires Low Grade Fuel to run.

chair.name: Chair
chair.description: Every home needs a chair. A decorative item which provides comfort while seated.

champagne-boomer.name: Champagne Boomer
champagne-boomer.description: A very large mortar type firework with an massive champagne colored explosion followed by smaller orange starbursts

chandelier.name: Chandelier
chandelier.description: A large adjustable electric chandelier. Very fancy.

charcoal.name: Charcoal
charcoal.description: A byproduct of burning wood in furnaces, campfires, and BBQs. Collected automatically as wood burns. Combined with Sulfur to make Gun Powder.

chicken-coop.name: Chicken Coop
chicken-coop.description: An enclosure to keep some chickens around. Chickens with plenty of food, water and sunlight produce more eggs.

chicken-costume.name: Chicken Costume
chicken-costume.description: An inflatable chicken costume. Acting as a replacement for wooden pants, you can equip this item to look as silly as possible.

chicken-pie.name: Chicken Pie
chicken-pie.description: Just like mom used to make. Provides a boost to hunger, health and hydration. Increases the chance of better genes from crops for short time.

chocolate-bar.name: Chocolate Bar
chocolate-bar.description: Chocolate Bar found as loot. Eating it provides a small boost to health, hunger, and thirst.

christmas-door-wreath.name: Christmas Door Wreath
christmas-door-wreath.description: Get into the christmas spirit with this holiday door wreath.

christmas-lights.name: Christmas Lights
christmas-lights.description: A string of colored lights to decorate your home

christmas-tree.name: Christmas Tree
christmas-tree.description: Get into the holiday spirit with this decorative Christmas tree

circle-balloon.name: Circle Balloon
circle-balloon.description: A circular balloon to use as decoration and for you to celebrate. You can write on it.

clatter-helmet.name: Clatter Helmet
clatter-helmet.description: Special helmet for players who own Clatter and have played for at least 30 minutes, replaces the bucket helmet.

cloth.name: Cloth
cloth.description: Harvested from hemp plants growing in the wild or obtained by scrapping burlap clothing. A key material for crafting armor, bags, and medical supplies.

clothing-mannequin.name: Clothing Mannequin
clothing-mannequin.description: Displays a set of clothing, quickly remove items off your player onto the Mannequin. Goes by Manny.

clothingmannequin.name: #clothingmannequin
clothingmannequin.description: Displays a set of clothing. Quickly transfer items from your player to the mannequin and back. Goes by Manny.

clump-of-latex-balloons.name: Clump of Latex Balloons
clump-of-latex-balloons.description: A clump of latex balloons to use as decoration and for you to celebrate.

clump-of-mixed-balloons.name: Clump of Mixed Balloons
clump-of-mixed-balloons.description: A clump of mixed balloons to use as decoration and for you to celebrate.

coal-.name: Coal :(
coal-.description: A lump of coal. A disappointing gift found in Christmas stockings during the holiday event.

cockpit-vehicle-module.name: Cockpit Vehicle Module
cockpit-vehicle-module.description: Single module cockpit for a driver and one passenger.

cockpit-with-engine-vehicle-module.name: Cockpit With Engine Vehicle Module
cockpit-with-engine-vehicle-module.description: Single module cockpit for a driver and one passenger, with a small engine.

coconut.name: Coconut
coconut.description: A coconut. Consuming it restores hydration, and the flesh yields a modest amount of calories.

coconut-armor-chestplate.name: Coconut Armor Chestplate
coconut-armor-chestplate.description: A shoddy piece of body armor made from coconut and plants, provides some basic protection from melee and ranged attacks.

coconut-armor-gloves.name: Coconut Armor Gloves
coconut-armor-gloves.description: Hand protection made of bark and plants, offers some protection to the upper body.

coconut-armor-helmet.name: Coconut Armor Helmet
coconut-armor-helmet.description: A shoddy helmet made from coconut, provides some basic protection from melee and ranged attacks.

coconut-armor-pants.name: Coconut Armor Pants
coconut-armor-pants.description: A shoddy piece of leg armor made from coconut and plants, provides some basic protection from melee and ranged attacks.

coffee-can-helmet.name: Coffee Can Helmet
coffee-can-helmet.description: A Coffee Can Helmet. It provides a level of regional protection from inflicted damage.

coffin.name: Coffin
coffin.description: An old wooden coffin, can store up to 42 items

combat-knife.name: Combat Knife
combat-knife.description: Combat knife designed for close combat engagements, can attack while sprinting. Best in class at harvesting flesh.

compass.name: Compass
compass.description: A handy tool which indicates which direction you're facing. Will reveal your location on the map in Hardcore mode if equipped on your belt.

compound-bow.name: Compound Bow
compound-bow.description: High damage silent weapon. Charge for maximum damage and velocity.

computer-station.name: Computer Station
computer-station.description: A powered terminal that lets you remotely view feeds from any CCTV Cameras registered to it. Also used to control MLRS systems and monitor other compatible devices.

concrete-hatchet.name: Concrete Hatchet
concrete-hatchet.description: A salvaged piece of concrete and rebar which can be used to harvest wood

concrete-pickaxe.name: Concrete Pickaxe
concrete-pickaxe.description: A salvaged piece of concrete and rebar with a sharp edge. Can be used to harvest Stone, Metal ore and Sulfur ore.

confetti-cannon.name: Confetti Cannon
confetti-cannon.description: Blast a cloud of birthday themed confetti cheer.

connected-speaker.name: Connected Speaker
connected-speaker.description: A small speaker that will play any audio from a connected Boom Box.

cooked-bear-meat.name: Cooked Bear Meat
cooked-bear-meat.description: Delicious Bear Meat, Eating it will restore some health, hunger, and thirst.

cooked-big-cat-meat.name: Cooked Big Cat Meat
cooked-big-cat-meat.description: Delicious Big Cat Meat, Eating it will restore some health, hunger, and thirst.

cooked-chicken.name: Cooked Chicken
cooked-chicken.description: Cooked chicken. Eating it will restore some health, hunger, and thirst.

cooked-crocodile-meat.name: Cooked Crocodile Meat
cooked-crocodile-meat.description: Delicious Crocodile Meat, Eating it will restore some health, hunger, and thirst.

cooked-deer-meat.name: Cooked Deer Meat
cooked-deer-meat.description: Cooked Deer Meat. Eating it will restore some health, hunger, and thirst.

cooked-fish.name: Cooked Fish
cooked-fish.description: Cooked Fish. Eating it provides a small boost to health, hunger, and thirst.

cooked-horse-meat.name: Cooked Horse Meat
cooked-horse-meat.description: Cooked Horse Meat. Eating it will restore some health, hunger, and thirst.

cooked-human-meat.name: Cooked Human Meat
cooked-human-meat.description: Salty meat from a human being, eating this will restore some hunger and health but reduces hydration. Maybe you should look for a better food source.

cooked-pork.name: Cooked Pork
cooked-pork.description: Cooked pork, Eating it will restore some health, hunger, and thirst.

cooked-snake-meat.name: Cooked Snake Meat
cooked-snake-meat.description: Delicious Snake Meat, Eating it will restore some health, hunger, and thirst.

cooked-wolf-meat.name: Cooked Wolf Meat
cooked-wolf-meat.description: Cooked Wolf Meat. Eating it will restore some health, hunger, and thirst.

cooking-workbench.name: Cooking Workbench
cooking-workbench.description: Used to cook advanced recipes for food, fuel, ammunition and explosives.

corn.name: Corn
corn.description: An ear of corn. Eating it provides a small boost to health, hunger, and thirst.

corn-clone.name: Corn Clone
corn-clone.description: A Clipping of a Corn Plant.

corn-seed.name: Corn Seed
corn-seed.description: Corn Seeds can be planted in the ground or a planter box to grow additional food. Watering with large quantities of water speeds up growth.

counter.name: Counter
counter.description: Counts incoming power pulses and displays the current count on a small screen. Outputs power once the count reaches a configured threshold value.

cowbell.name: Cowbell
cowbell.description: A road sign that's been repurposed to produce some beautiful, calming, percussion.

crate-costume.name: Crate Costume
crate-costume.description: A sneaky crate costume. Use with a friend to expertly troll other players

crocodile-pie.name: Crocodile Pie
crocodile-pie.description: A pie made from crocodile meat. Boosts hunger, health and hydration. Grants better night vision and temporary cold resistance.

crossbow.name: Crossbow
crossbow.description: Silent and accurate. More powerful than the hunting bow but slower to reload.

crude-oil.name: Crude Oil
crude-oil.description: Raw petroleum harvested from underwater crates or extracted via a Pump Jack. Must be processed in an Oil Refinery to produce Low Grade Fuel.

cursed-cauldron.name: Cursed Cauldron
cursed-cauldron.description: A spooky cast iron cauldron with a green goo.

custom-smg.name: Custom SMG
custom-smg.description: Early T1 SMG. Cheap to craft and easy to use — perfect for early-game aggression.

decorative-baubels.name: Decorative Baubels
decorative-baubels.description: Decorative Baubels you can hang on your Christmas tree

decorative-gingerbread-men.name: Decorative Gingerbread Men
decorative-gingerbread-men.description: Decorative Gingerbread Men you can hang on your Christmas tree

decorative-pinecones.name: Decorative Pinecones
decorative-pinecones.description: Decorative Pinecones you can hang on your Christmas tree

decorative-plastic-candy-canes.name: Decorative Plastic Candy Canes
decorative-plastic-candy-canes.description: Decorative Plastic Candy Canes you can hang on your Christmas tree

decorative-tinsel.name: Decorative Tinsel
decorative-tinsel.description: Decorative Tinsel you can hang on your Christmas tree

deluxe-christmas-lights.name: Deluxe Christmas Lights
deluxe-christmas-lights.description: Colored, animated, powered Lights that can be deployed point by point to light up your base.

diesel-fuel.name: Diesel Fuel
diesel-fuel.description: Suitable fuel to power quarries and the giant excavator.

digital-clock.name: Digital Clock
digital-clock.description: A digital clock that displays the server time and lets you set alarms to pass power through when ringing. Ideal for synchronizing traps or timed events.

disco-ball.name: Disco Ball
disco-ball.description: Get groovy with this stunning disco ball.

disco-floor.name: Disco Floor
disco-floor.description: A vibrant flashing floor that pulses in time to music.

discord-trophy.name: Discord Trophy
discord-trophy.description: A companion that reminds you of your youth.

diving-fins.name: Diving Fins
diving-fins.description: Diving Fins. Significantly boosts your speed underwater but greatly reduces mobility on land.

diving-mask.name: Diving Mask
diving-mask.description: A diving mask that provides clear vision under water at the cost of reduced peripheral vision.

diving-tank.name: Diving Tank
diving-tank.description: An oxygen tank that enables breathing under water for a period of time. Can be refilled at a workbench or repair bench.

documents.name: Documents
documents.description: A stack of technical looking documents.

door-controller.name: Door Controller
door-controller.description: Mounts next to a door and automatically opens or closes it when it receives a power signal. Used to build automated entry systems and keypad-locked doors.

door-key.name: Door Key
door-key.description: A key to a door, created from a Lock. Keep this item safe; if lost you'll be unable to open the door again!

double-barrel-shotgun.name: Double Barrel Shotgun
double-barrel-shotgun.description: Two shots of raw stopping power. Unmatched burst damage at point-blank range.

double-diving-tank.name: Double Diving Tank
double-diving-tank.description: An oxygen tank that enables breathing under water for a period of time. Can be refilled at a workbench. Holds 80% more Oxygen than a standard diving tank

double-horse-saddle.name: Double Horse Saddle
double-horse-saddle.description: A horse saddle with two seats. Having this item allows you to claim a horse in a stable by holding E and selecting the "Claim" option

double-sign-post.name: Double Sign Post
double-sign-post.description: A double sign post that you can plant into terrain.

dracula-cape.name: Dracula Cape
dracula-cape.description: A Halloween themed replacement for the Vagabond Jacket which flows in the wind.

dracula-mask.name: Dracula Mask
dracula-mask.description: A classic halloween costume mask which provides decent protection.

dragon-mask.name: Dragon Mask
dragon-mask.description: A special dragon mask to celebrate Chinese New Year

drone.name: Drone
drone.description: A remote controlled drone operated from the Computer station with a limited range. Easily damaged from impacts.

drop-box.name: Drop Box
drop-box.description: Deployed on walls so players can input items from outside the building for safe keeping. You can only retrieve items from the inside.

duct-tape.name: Duct Tape
duct-tape.description: A versatile adhesive tape reinforced with cloth.

easter-door-wreath.name: Easter Door Wreath
easter-door-wreath.description: A beautiful, hand crafted Easter themed door wreath.

egg.name: Egg
egg.description: An egg laid by a chicken, will hatch in a coop. Can be eaten raw but best saved for a recipe.

egg-basket.name: Egg Basket
egg-basket.description: An easter egg basket. Equip to pick up eggs during an easter egg hunt with left click. Use right click to throw

egg-suit.name: Egg Suit
egg-suit.description: An eggsquisite egg costume, can be painted when unequipped.

electric-furnace.name: Electric Furnace
electric-furnace.description: An electrical version of a furnace that uses electricity instead of a fuel source.

electric-fuse.name: Electric Fuse
electric-fuse.description: An unreliable electric fuse. Will allow electrical passthrough for a period of time.

electric-heater.name: Electric Heater
electric-heater.description: Provides warmth in a radius when on

electric-table-lamp.name: Electric Table Lamp
electric-table-lamp.description: A small light source made out of an old oil can.

electrical-branch.name: Electrical Branch
electrical-branch.description: Splits a main power line while diverting a configurable fixed amount to a branch output. The remainder passes through on the main line.

elevator.name: Elevator
elevator.description: A powered elevator. Place another elevator above or below this to connect it. Requires power.

empty-can-of-beans.name: Empty Can Of Beans
empty-can-of-beans.description: An empty Can of Beans. Can be smelted into Metal Fragments.

empty-tuna-can.name: Empty Tuna Can
empty-tuna-can.description: An empty Can of Tuna. Can be smelted into Metal Fragments.

engineering-workbench.name: Engineering Workbench
engineering-workbench.description: This allows you to craft and unlock electrical, water and industrial items

eoka-pistol.name: Eoka Pistol
eoka-pistol.description: The ultimate gamble. Cheap, unreliable, but absolutely devastating if it fires.

explosive-556-rifle-ammo.name: Explosive 5.56 Rifle Ammo
explosive-556-rifle-ammo.description: This ammo explodes on contact dealing a small amount of fragmentation damage to nearby objects.

explosives.name: Explosives
explosives.description: Explosives: A crafting component used to make Timed Explosive Charges and Rockets. Requires Workbench Tier 3. RustLab.

f1-grenade.name: F1 Grenade
f1-grenade.description: The F1 Grenade is a throwable explosive useful for early-game wood raiding and harassing players. Very cheap to craft but requires many grenades to destroy structures.

fabric-beanbag-seat.name: Fabric Beanbag Seat
fabric-beanbag-seat.description: A cozy fabric beanbag seat to sink in to.

fairy-lights.name: Fairy Lights
fairy-lights.description: A wire of small fairy bulbs, can be deployed point by point to light up your base.

fertilizer.name: Fertilizer
fertilizer.description: Helps plants grow by increasing ground condition. Produced in a composter.

festive-doorway-garland.name: Festive Doorway Garland
festive-doorway-garland.description: A Festive decoration to spruce up your  doorway during the holdiays!

festive-double-doorway-garland.name: Festive Double Doorway Garland
festive-double-doorway-garland.description: A Festive decoration to spruce up your double doorway during the holidays!

festive-window-garland.name: Festive Window Garland
festive-window-garland.description: A Festive decoration to spruce up your windows during the holdiays!

fire-arrow.name: Fire Arrow
fire-arrow.description: Fire Arrow: Incendiary ammo. Ignite by aiming skyward before firing. Used by Hunting Bow, Compound Bow, Crossbow. RustLab.

firebomb.name: Firebomb
firebomb.description: A crude firebomb made of fuel-filled jugs wrapped in a net. Can be placed or used as a projectile in a catapult.

fish-pie.name: Fish Pie
fish-pie.description: Delightful fish pie. Provides a boost to hunger, health and hydration. Increases base comfort level for a short time.

fish-trophy.name: Fish Trophy
fish-trophy.description: A wall mountable item to show off your greatest catches. Fish not included.

flame-thrower.name: Flame Thrower
flame-thrower.description: A Flamethrower. Uses low grade fuel as ammunition.

flame-turret.name: Flame Turret
flame-turret.description: Automated Flame turret. Requires Low Grade Fuel. Sprays flames when triggered.

flare.name: Flare
flare.description: Light up the night sky with this brand new red flare!

flashbang.name: Flashbang
flashbang.description: A bright explosive device which blinds and disorients anyone near it upon detonation

flashlight.name: Flashlight
flashlight.description: A powerful flashlight which illuminates your surroundings and can be used as a weapon.

flight-recorder-box.name: Flight Recorder Box
flight-recorder-box.description: Keep your things in this Flight Recorder box. Stores up to 18 items.

fluid-combiner.name: Fluid Combiner
fluid-combiner.description: Combines three separate fluid connections into one connection.

fluid-splitter.name: Fluid Splitter
fluid-splitter.description: Splits a fluid connection into three separate connections.

fluid-switch-pump.name: Fluid Switch & Pump
fluid-switch-pump.description: A simple switch that enables fluid to pass through. Can be switched on/off manually or via electricity. Can also pump water between containers.

fluorescent-light.name: Fluorescent Light
fluorescent-light.description: Bright enough to see what you’re doing.

fogger-3000.name: Fogger-3000
fogger-3000.description: A Fog machine which runs on low grade fuel. Can be set to fill an area with a dense fog or triggered by motion.

frankenstein-mask.name: Frankenstein Mask
frankenstein-mask.description: Frankenstein halloween costume mask which provides decent protection.

frankenstein-table.name: Frankenstein Table
frankenstein-table.description: Place a monsters head, torso and legs into the table to summon Frankensteins monster.

fridge.name: Fridge
fridge.description: A fridge you can store food into!

frog-boots.name: Frog Boots
frog-boots.description: Thank you for playing the game through its early access run. Enjoy these boots made from radiation resistant frog rubber.

frontier-bolts-single-item-rack.name: Frontier Bolts Single Item Rack
frontier-bolts-single-item-rack.description: Artfully display your weapon with a handcrafted wall-mounted single weapon rack.

frontier-hatchet.name: Frontier Hatchet
frontier-hatchet.description: A Frontier Hatchet, useful for chopping trees and dismembering corpses.

frontier-horns-single-item-rack.name: Frontier Horns Single Item Rack
frontier-horns-single-item-rack.description: Artfully display your weapon with a handcrafted wall-mounted single weapon rack.

frontier-horseshoe-single-item-rack.name: Frontier Horseshoe Single Item Rack
frontier-horseshoe-single-item-rack.description: Artfully display your weapon with a handcrafted wall-mounted single weapon rack.

frontier-mirror-large.name: Frontier Mirror Large
frontier-mirror-large.description: A large wooden frontier themed mirror

frontier-mirror-medium.name: Frontier Mirror Medium
frontier-mirror-medium.description: A medium wood frontier themed mirror

frontier-mirror-small.name: Frontier Mirror Small
frontier-mirror-small.description: A small wooden frontier themed mirror

frontier-mirror-standing.name: Frontier Mirror Standing
frontier-mirror-standing.description: A standing wooden frontier themed mirror

furnace.name: Furnace
furnace.description: A Furnace. Use it to smelt mined ore.

garrys-mod-tool-gun.name: Garry's Mod Tool Gun
garrys-mod-tool-gun.description: Use this Garry's Mod Tool Gun to upgrade building parts and pick up deployed objects. Celebrating 15 years of Garry's Mod!

gas-compression-overdrive.name: Gas Compression Overdrive
gas-compression-overdrive.description: An internal weapon mod that compresses gasses to increase fire rate. Compatible with select automatic weapons. Reduces recoil control slightly.

gears.name: Gears
gears.description: Mechanical gear components salvaged from barrels and crates. Required for powered doors and engine-based crafting recipes.

geiger-counter.name: Geiger Counter
geiger-counter.description: A geiger counter used by scientists

ghost-costume.name: Ghost Costume
ghost-costume.description: Definitely not a last minute costume idea.

giant-candy-decor.name: Giant Candy Decor
giant-candy-decor.description: Get into the holiday spirit with this decorative inflated giant candy cane

giant-lollipop-decor.name: Giant Lollipop Decor
giant-lollipop-decor.description: Get into the holiday spirit with these decorative giant lollipops

gingerbread-suit.name: Gingerbread Suit
gingerbread-suit.description: A suit made of gingerbread, slightly crunchy.

glowing-eyes.name: Glowing Eyes
glowing-eyes.description: A cosmetic item that makes your character's eyes glow in the dark. Purely cosmetic — provides no protection or gameplay benefit.

gold-egg.name: Gold Egg
gold-egg.description: A Gold Egg. Containing the best easter loot.

granola-bar.name: Granola Bar
granola-bar.description: Granola Bar found as loot. Eating it provides a small boost to health, hunger.

gravestone.name: Gravestone
gravestone.description: A Gravestone marking the remains of an unknown soul

green.name: Green
green.description: A rocking chair that responds to your input. Don't fire whilst seated.

green-berry.name: Green Berry
green-berry.description: A green berry. Can be eaten or used in mixing table recipes to create teas.

green-berry-clone.name: Green Berry Clone
green-berry-clone.description: A clipping of a Green Berry Plant.

green-berry-seed.name: Green Berry Seed
green-berry-seed.description:
These green berry seeds can be planted in the ground and grown to collect additional food.


Planting these seeds in a planter, and then watering them with large quantities of water yields significantly more Corn and faster groth.

green-boomer.name: Green Boomer
green-boomer.description: A very large mortar type firework with a green starburst

green-keycard.name: Green Keycard
green-keycard.description: A low level clearance card granting access to basic areas.

green-roman-candle.name: Green Roman Candle
green-roman-candle.description: A small repeating firework, shoots a series of Green balls into the air

grub.name: Grub
grub.description: A pale, fleshy insect that can be used for bait. Could also be eaten in desperate situations.

gun-powder.name: Gun Powder
gun-powder.description: Made from Sulfur and Charcoal, a key ingredient of anything that goes bang!

half-height-bamboo-shelves.name: Half Height Bamboo Shelves
half-height-bamboo-shelves.description: Half height salvaged bamboo shelves for stacking

halloween-candy.name: Halloween Candy
halloween-candy.description: Some loose halloween candy Collect 10 to upgrade to a Small Loot Bag!

hammer.name: Hammer
hammer.description: A Hammer, used to upgrade building materials. Right-click for the options. You can also pick up deployed objects while the hammer is equipped.

hammerhead-bolt.name: Hammerhead Bolt
hammerhead-bolt.description: Heavy and solid bolt for a ballista, designed to hammer through doors.

handcuffs.name: Handcuffs
handcuffs.description: Use on a surrendering or wounded player to keep them restrained. The wearer is blocked from using items or accessing inventory.

handmade-fishing-rod.name: Handmade Fishing Rod
handmade-fishing-rod.description: Use [attack2] to cast out the line and wait for a bite. Requires bait.

handmade-shell.name: Handmade Shell
handmade-shell.description: Handmade Shell: Budget shotgun ammo with multiple projectiles. Used by Waterpipe Shotgun and Eoka Pistol. RustLab.

handmade-smg.name: Handmade SMG
handmade-smg.description: An extremely basic automatic firearm. Low damage and accuracy.

hatchet.name: Hatchet
hatchet.description: A Hatchet, useful for chopping trees and dismembering corpses.

hazmat-plushy.name: Hazmat Plushy
hazmat-plushy.description: A plushy of your favourite outfit made by the fabulous people at YouTooz.com

hazmat-suit.name: Hazmat Suit
hazmat-suit.description: A hazmat suit made from radiation resistant rubber.

hbhf-sensor.name: HBHF Sensor
hbhf-sensor.description: A Heartbeat, Breathing, Humidity and Footstep sensor. Passthrough is equal to the number of humans detected in a 10m radius

head-bag.name: Head Bag
head-bag.description: A sack containing the head of a defeated foe. Can be added to trophies.

headset.name: Headset
headset.description: Every gamer needs a headset! - Gained from Rust's first Twitch drop event.

heart-balloon.name: Heart Balloon
heart-balloon.description: A heart-shaped balloon to use as decoration and for you to celebrate. You can write on it.

heavy-frankenstein-head.name: Heavy Frankenstein Head
heavy-frankenstein-head.description:
Slightly slower, slightly stronger.

Combined at a Frankenstein Table to create your very own monster.

heavy-frankenstein-legs.name: Heavy Frankenstein Legs
heavy-frankenstein-legs.description:
Slightly slower, slightly stronger.

Combined at a Frankenstein Table to create your very own monster.

heavy-frankenstein-torso.name: Heavy Frankenstein Torso
heavy-frankenstein-torso.description:
Slightly slower, slightly stronger.

Combined at a Frankenstein Table to create your very own monster.

heavy-plate-helmet.name: Heavy Plate Helmet
heavy-plate-helmet.description: Offers superior protection at the cost of reduced vision and movement speed.

heavy-plate-jacket.name: Heavy Plate Jacket
heavy-plate-jacket.description: Offers superior protection at the cost of aiming down sights and reduced movement speed.

heavy-plate-pants.name: Heavy Plate Pants
heavy-plate-pants.description: Offers superior protection at the cost of reduced movement speed.

heavy-scientist-suit.name: Heavy Scientist Suit
heavy-scientist-suit.description: A heavy hazmat suit made from radiation resistant rubber.

hemp-clone.name: Hemp Clone
hemp-clone.description: A clipping of a hemp plant.

hemp-seed.name: Hemp Seed
hemp-seed.description: Hemp Seeds can be planted in the ground or a planter box to grow additional Cloth. Watering with large quantities of water speeds up growth.

herring.name: Herring
herring.description: A small fish commonly found in a variety of water sources.

hide-boots.name: Hide Boots
hide-boots.description: Simple hide boots, made with common materials. Basic all-round protection.

hide-halterneck.name: Hide Halterneck
hide-halterneck.description: A Halterneck made from the hide of an animal.

hide-pants.name: Hide Pants
hide-pants.description: Trousers made from the hide of an animal. Moderate protection against animal attacks.

hide-poncho.name: Hide Poncho
hide-poncho.description: Primitive armour for the chest made from animal skin. One size fits all. Offers some basic protection from damage and the elements.

hide-skirt.name: Hide Skirt
hide-skirt.description: Simple hide skirt, made with common materials. Basic all-round protection.

hide-vest.name: Hide Vest
hide-vest.description: Simple hide vest, made with common materials. Basic all-round protection.

high-caliber-revolver.name: High Caliber Revolver
high-caliber-revolver.description: High Caliber Revolver — a powerful handgun chambered in high caliber rounds. Crafting, ammo & recycle. RustLab.

high-quality-carburetor.name: High Quality Carburetor
high-quality-carburetor.description: A high quality carburetor for a combustion engine. Mixes air and fuel to the proper ratio.

high-quality-crankshaft.name: High Quality Crankshaft
high-quality-crankshaft.description: A high quality crankshaft for a combustion engine. Converts piston movement into rotational motion.

high-quality-horse-shoes.name: High Quality Horse Shoes
high-quality-horse-shoes.description: Equipping these horse shoes will grant your horse additional movement speed

high-quality-metal.name: High Quality Metal
high-quality-metal.description: High quality metal suitable for armor and weapons construction.

high-quality-metal-ore.name: High Quality Metal Ore
high-quality-metal-ore.description: A rock containing High Quality Metal. Can be smelted in a furnace.

high-quality-pistons.name: High Quality Pistons
high-quality-pistons.description: High quality pistons for a combustion engine. Pistons convert expanding combustion gases into the motion that turns a crankshaft.

high-quality-spark-plugs.name: High Quality Spark Plugs
high-quality-spark-plugs.description: High quality spark plugs for a combustion engine. Spark plugs ignite the fuel/air mixture to move the pistons.

high-quality-valves.name: High Quality Valves
high-quality-valves.description: High quality poppet valves for a combustion engine. Valves control the intake and exhaust flow.

high-velocity-arrow.name: High Velocity Arrow
high-velocity-arrow.description: Lighter, faster arrow that deals less damage.

high-velocity-rocket.name: High Velocity Rocket
high-velocity-rocket.description: Fast moving rocket ammunition for the Rocket Launcher. Short to medium range self-propelled rocket which deals large splash damage on impact.

hitch-trough.name: Hitch & Trough
hitch-trough.description: A Hitching post and Trough. Dismounting your horses here will keep them healthy and fed as long as it is kept stocked with food.

hmlmg.name: HMLMG
hmlmg.description: A hand made belt-fed light machine gun with high damage, high rate of fire, low accuracy during short bursts.

hobo-barrel.name: Hobo Barrel
hobo-barrel.description: A vagabond staple. Use this repurposed oil barrel to stay warm.

hockey-mask.name: Hockey Mask
hockey-mask.description: A protective facemask which provides the user with excellent head protection from all forms of attacks.

holosight.name: Holosight
holosight.description: Uses laser projection to create a holographic sight which is always pointing at the target regardless of view angle.

homemade-landmine.name: Homemade Landmine
homemade-landmine.description: Homemade Landmine. If you stand on one, you can ask a friend to disarm it before it explodes.

homing-missile.name: Homing Missile
homing-missile.description: Fast moving rocket ammunition. Uses a type of radar for active target guidance from a Homing Launcher

homing-missile-launcher.name: Homing Missile Launcher
homing-missile-launcher.description: An active-guidance homing missile launcher. Once launched, the target must be tracked by the launcher until impact. Can be distracted by flares.

honeycomb.name: Honeycomb
honeycomb.description: Building blocks of a hive, taken from a natural beehive. Can be cooked in a furnace to guarantee honey, or extracted for honey and a small chance of a nucleus.

hoodie.name: Hoodie
hoodie.description: A comfortable hoodie offering basic protection from cold and minor incoming damage.

hopper.name: Hopper
hopper.description: Will suck up any dropped items in it's radius while powered

horizontal-weapon-rack.name: Horizontal Weapon Rack
horizontal-weapon-rack.description: Artfully display your arsenal with a handcrafted wall-mounted weapon rack.

horse.name: Horse
horse.description: A rideable horse. Feed and water it to keep it healthy. Equip saddles and horseshoes for improved speed and carry capacity.

horse-costume.name: Horse Costume
horse-costume.description: An inflatable horse costume. Acting as a replacement for wooden pants, you can equip this item to look as silly as possible.

horse-mask.name: Horse Mask
horse-mask.description: A Beautifully crafted red and gold Horse mask to celebrate the 2026 Lunar New Year. This item replaces the wolf headdress.

horse-saddle.name: Horse Saddle
horse-saddle.description: Having this item allows you to claim a horse in a stable by holding E and selecting the "Claim" option

hose-tool.name: Hose Tool
hose-tool.description: A tool for making fluid connections between objects. Aim at an input/output handle and click another handle to form a connection.

hot-air-balloon.name: Hot Air Balloon
hot-air-balloon.description: A deployable hot air balloon. Requires low grade fuel and offers aerial travel across the map.

hot-air-balloon-armor.name: Hot Air Balloon Armor
hot-air-balloon-armor.description: Armor for the Hot Air Balloon

huge-wooden-sign.name: Huge Wooden Sign
huge-wooden-sign.description: A 6-meter by 3-meter wooden sign that you can write on.

hunters-pie.name: Hunters Pie
hunters-pie.description: Tasty hunters pie, made with real deer. Provides a boost to hunger, health and hydration. Reduces bleeding for a short time.

hunting-bow.name: Hunting Bow
hunting-bow.description: The cheapest viable ranged weapon. Silent and deadly in skilled hands.

hv-556-rifle-ammo.name: HV 5.56 Rifle Ammo
hv-556-rifle-ammo.description: This ammunition travels faster, resulting in less drop and slightly higher damage when fired over long distances.

hv-pistol-ammo.name: HV Pistol Ammo
hv-pistol-ammo.description: This ammunition travels faster, resulting in less drop and slightly higher damage when fired over long distances.

ice-metal-chest-plate.name: Ice Metal Chest Plate
ice-metal-chest-plate.description: A metal plate covering your torso, provides excellent protection from all forms of attacks.

ice-metal-facemask.name: Ice Metal Facemask
ice-metal-facemask.description: A protective facemask which provides the user with excellent head protection from all forms of attacks.

ice-sculpture.name: Ice Sculpture
ice-sculpture.description: A block of ice you can sculpt and light up with electric power.

ice-throne.name: Ice Throne
ice-throne.description: An Ice Throne. Fit for the one true arctic warlord.

igniter.name: Igniter
igniter.description: Ignites nearby objects such as furnaces and campfires when power is received

improvised-balaclava.name: Improvised Balaclava
improvised-balaclava.description: A makeshift balaclava. Cost effective protection from the cold, but unremarkable at preventing melee and projectile damage.

improvised-shield.name: Improvised Shield
improvised-shield.description: A makeshift metal shield, sturdy but only protects a small area. Usable with single handed weapons and tools.

incapacitate-dart.name: Incapacitate Dart
incapacitate-dart.description: A dart that slows your target and blocks their vision briefly.

incendiary-556-rifle-ammo.name: Incendiary 5.56 Rifle Ammo
incendiary-556-rifle-ammo.description: Slower moving ammunition that deals fire damage. There's a small chance it will start a fire.

incendiary-bolt.name: Incendiary Bolt
incendiary-bolt.description: A fire-tipped bolt for a ballista, wrapped in burning cloth, ignites upon impact.

incendiary-pistol-bullet.name: Incendiary Pistol Bullet
incendiary-pistol-bullet.description: Slower moving ammunition that deals fire damage. There's a small chance it will start a fire.

incendiary-rocket.name: Incendiary Rocket
incendiary-rocket.description: Incendiary Rocket: Creates fire upon impact. Great for destroying wood structures. Used by Rocket Launcher. RustLab.

industrial-combiner.name: Industrial Combiner
industrial-combiner.description: Combines three separate industrial connections into one connection.

industrial-conveyor.name: Industrial Conveyor
industrial-conveyor.description: Moves an item from one container to another.

industrial-crafter.name: Industrial Crafter
industrial-crafter.description: Attaches to a workbench to allow automated crafting.

industrial-splitter.name: Industrial Splitter
industrial-splitter.description: Splits an industrial connection into three separate connections.

inner-tube.name: Inner Tube
inner-tube.description: An inflated tube for aquatic activities.

instant-camera.name: Instant Camera
instant-camera.description: An instant camera. Take photos with primary fire, zoom in and out with secondary fire, and change focus mode with reload.

jack-o-lantern-angry.name: Jack O Lantern Angry
jack-o-lantern-angry.description: A Lantern. Place it where you need light.

jack-o-lantern-happy.name: Jack O Lantern Happy
jack-o-lantern-happy.description: A Lantern. Place it where you need light.

jacket.name: Jacket
jacket.description: A rugged jacket, will help keep you warm. High cold protection but incompatible with other chest attire.

jackhammer.name: Jackhammer
jackhammer.description: A Pneumatic Jackhammer to blast through ore nodes instantly. No aiming required — all weak spots are destroyed. Refill at a Workbench.

jar-of-honey.name: Jar of Honey
jar-of-honey.description: A jar of honey. Good for reducing hunger and radiation, or could be saved for recipes. The source of the glass jar is a mystery.

jerry-can-guitar.name: Jerry Can Guitar
jerry-can-guitar.description: Take advantage of the unique acoustics of the Jerry Can Guitar to play some rustic tunes.

jumpsuit.name: Jumpsuit
jumpsuit.description: A full-body jumpsuit providing basic protection from damage and the elements.

jungle-relic-assault-rifle.name: Jungle Relic Assault Rifle
jungle-relic-assault-rifle.description: Jungle Relic themed high damage machine rifle.

jungle-rock.name: Jungle Rock
jungle-rock.description: A Jungle Rock. The most basic melee weapon and gathering tool.

junkyard-drum-kit.name: Junkyard Drum Kit
junkyard-drum-kit.description: An array of pots, pans and buckets that passes as a serviceable Drum Kit. Three cymbals, some Tom Drums and a Kick Drum means you can easily lay down a beat.

kayak.name: Kayak
kayak.description: An improvised wooden kayak. Seats two and requires a Paddle to operate.

knights-armour-cuirass.name: Knights armour cuirass
knights-armour-cuirass.description: A well made collection of scrap metal formed into a knights armour.

knights-armour-helmet.name: Knights armour helmet
knights-armour-helmet.description: A medieval knights helmet. Made from scrap metal. Excellent craftmanship.

knights-armour-skirt-plates.name: Knights armour skirt plates
knights-armour-skirt-plates.description: A well made set of knights plate that covers the hips and thighs. Made of scrap metal.

krieg-chainsword.name: Krieg chainsword
krieg-chainsword.description: A brutal tool of war, roaring to life with every swing.

krieg-hazmat.name: Krieg Hazmat
krieg-hazmat.description: A Krieg Hazmat Suit, standard issue for those who never retreat.

krieg-large-backpack.name: Krieg Large Backpack
krieg-large-backpack.description: Carry your essentials in a rugged military pack, built for endurance and practicality.

krieg-shotgun.name: Krieg Shotgun
krieg-shotgun.description: Heavy, reliable, and unforgiving. A weapon that never hesitates.

krieg-storage-barrel.name: Krieg Storage Barrel
krieg-storage-barrel.description: Industrial barrels repurposed for the front lines. Sturdy, disciplined, and unmistakably Krieg.

krieg-storage-crates.name: Krieg Storage Crates
krieg-storage-crates.description: Military-grade crates designed for efficient storage and durability. A staple of any well-supplied outpost.

l96-rifle.name: L96 Rifle
l96-rifle.description: End-game bolt-action sniper rifle with the highest projectile velocity in Rust. Virtually no bullet drop at extreme range — the definitive long-range weapon.

landscape-photo-frame.name: Landscape Photo Frame
landscape-photo-frame.description: A landscape oriented canvas for artists paintings.

landscape-picture-frame.name: Landscape Picture Frame
landscape-picture-frame.description: A landscape oriented canvas for artists paintings.

lantern.name: Lantern
lantern.description: A Lantern. Place it where you need light, requires low grade fuel to work.

large-backpack.name: Large Backpack
large-backpack.description: A larger military backpack that can hold items inside it

large-banner-hanging.name: Large Banner Hanging
large-banner-hanging.description: A large banner hanging on a wall.

large-banner-on-pole.name: Large Banner on pole
large-banner-on-pole.description: A large banner hanging on a pole.

large-furnace.name: Large Furnace
large-furnace.description: Used to smelt large quantities of ore. Difficult to secure, must be placed on terrain.

large-hunting-trophy.name: Large Hunting Trophy
large-hunting-trophy.description: A large trophy stand to mount the head of killed animals or enemies.

large-loot-bag.name: Large Loot Bag
large-loot-bag.description: A massive haul. Contains the best halloween loot

large-medkit.name: Large Medkit
large-medkit.description: A large medkit that heals to max health over time and stops bleeding instantly. Guarantees 100% recovery from a downed state.

large-photo-frame.name: Large Photo Frame
large-photo-frame.description: A large frame for your photos.

large-planter-box.name: Large Planter Box
large-planter-box.description: A large planter with enough room to plant 9 seeds.

large-present.name: Large Present
large-present.description: A Large Present, the best there is. Unwrap it now!

large-rechargeable-battery.name: Large Rechargeable Battery
large-rechargeable-battery.description: A large rechargeable battery. Must have a minimum charge of 5 seconds to discharge. Can be wired in series. Max 80% charging efficiency.

large-solar-panel.name: Large Solar Panel
large-solar-panel.description: Converts sunlight into electrical power, providing up to 20W at optimal angle. Output varies based on panel orientation and time of day.

large-wood-box.name: Large Wood Box
large-wood-box.description: Keep your things in this wooden storage box. Stores up to 48 items.

large-wooden-sign.name: Large Wooden Sign
large-wooden-sign.description: A 3-meter by 1.5-meter wooden sign that you can write on.

laser-detector.name: Laser Detector
laser-detector.description: A gate which allows power to flow while a player is in the beam

laser-light.name: Laser Light
laser-light.description: A small device that shoots out visible lasers in time to music.

latex-balloon.name: Latex Balloon
latex-balloon.description: A latex balloon to use as decoration and for you to celebrate. You can write on it.

lead-armor-insert.name: Lead Armor Insert
lead-armor-insert.description: Lead insert that adds radiation protection for crafted clothes and armor.

leather.name: Leather
leather.description: Obtained by hunting and butchering large animals such as horses, bears, stags, and boars. Used primarily to craft leather-based armor sets.

leather-beanbag-seat.name: Leather Beanbag Seat
leather-beanbag-seat.description: A cozy leather beanbag seat to sink in to.

leather-gloves.name: Leather Gloves
leather-gloves.description: Gloves made out of leather, offers a small amount of protection to the upper body.

legacy-bow.name: Legacy Bow
legacy-bow.description: Hunting Bow, useful for short to medium range combat and hunting.

legacy-furnace.name: Legacy Furnace
legacy-furnace.description: An older version of the furnace used to smelt ore into metal and other crafting materials.

light-frankenstein-head.name: Light Frankenstein Head
light-frankenstein-head.description:
Slightly faster, slightly weaker.

Combined at a Frankenstein Table to create your very own monster.

light-frankenstein-legs.name: Light Frankenstein Legs
light-frankenstein-legs.description:
Slightly faster, slightly weaker.

Combined at a Frankenstein Table to create your very own monster.

light-frankenstein-torso.name: Light Frankenstein Torso
light-frankenstein-torso.description:
Slightly faster, slightly weaker.

Combined at a Frankenstein Table to create your very own monster.

light-up-frame-xxl.name: Light-Up Frame XXL
light-up-frame-xxl.description: An extra extra large light up frame

locker.name: Locker
locker.description: A locker for keeping your clothes and armor safe!

locomotive.name: Locomotive
locomotive.description: A powerful locomotive for pulling train cars along the underground rail system.

longsleeve-t-shirt.name: Longsleeve T-Shirt
longsleeve-t-shirt.description: Long sleeve tshirt, versatile clothing for protection against damage and the elements.

longsword.name: Longsword
longsword.description: A powerful 2-handed melee weapon with good range and high damage.

low-grade-fuel.name: Low Grade Fuel
low-grade-fuel.description: Low Grade Fuel, used to power light sources.

low-quality-carburetor.name: Low Quality Carburetor
low-quality-carburetor.description: A low quality carburetor for a combustion engine. Mixes air and fuel to the proper ratio.

low-quality-crankshaft.name: Low Quality Crankshaft
low-quality-crankshaft.description: A low quality crankshaft for a combustion engine. Converts piston movement into rotational motion.

low-quality-pistons.name: Low Quality Pistons
low-quality-pistons.description: Low quality pistons for a combustion engine. Pistons convert expanding combustion gases into the motion that turns a crankshaft.

low-quality-spark-plugs.name: Low Quality Spark Plugs
low-quality-spark-plugs.description: Low quality spark plugs for a combustion engine. Spark plugs ignite the fuel/air mixture to move the pistons.

low-quality-valves.name: Low Quality Valves
low-quality-valves.description: Low quality poppet valves for a combustion engine. Valves control the intake and exhaust flow.

lr-300-assault-rifle.name: LR-300 Assault Rifle
lr-300-assault-rifle.description: A more controllable alternative to the AK. Lower damage but easier recoil pattern.

lumberjack-hoodie.name: Lumberjack Hoodie
lumberjack-hoodie.description: A lumberjack themed hoodie, earned by helping the Lumberjack. Offers the same protection as the standard hoodie.

lunar-new-year-horse-armor.name: Lunar New Year Horse Armor
lunar-new-year-horse-armor.description: A full body Lunar New Year themed armor for a horse. Provides strong protection for you and your steed, at the cost of greatly reduced movement speed.

lunar-new-year-spear.name: Lunar New Year Spear
lunar-new-year-spear.description: A Chinese themed New Year themed metal Spear

m15-semi-automatic-pistol.name: M15 Semi-Automatic Pistol
m15-semi-automatic-pistol.description: A special issue Air Force semi-automatic pistol, fires rapidly and with good accuracy.

m249.name: M249
m249.description: High-capacity light machine gun. 100-round magazine makes it deadly in sustained fire.

m39-rifle.name: M39 Rifle
m39-rifle.description: Semi-automatic marksman rifle bridging the gap between the SAR and bolt-action. More accurate and longer-ranged than the SAR, ideal for medium-long range engagements.

m4-shotgun.name: M4 Shotgun
m4-shotgun.description: M4 Shotgun — semi-automatic military shotgun with a high fire rate. Uses 12 gauge ammo. Crafting, ammo & recycle. RustLab.

m92-pistol.name: M92 Pistol
m92-pistol.description: High-capacity 15-round semi-automatic pistol. The fastest-firing pistol in Rust — excellent sustained DPS at close to mid range.

mace.name: Mace
mace.description: A powerful 2-handed melee weapon, It's unique design makes it easier to hit your target when compared to other more traditional weapons.

machete.name: Machete
machete.description: A brutal weapon with good range.

mail-box.name: Mail Box
mail-box.description: A Mailbox that accepts notes. Only you can access the mail due to a one way slit.

medical-syringe.name: Medical Syringe
medical-syringe.description: Heal yourself or others with this syringe. Left-click heals you, right-click heals a target.

medieval-ar.name: Medieval AR
medieval-ar.description: Medieval themed high damage machine rifle.

medieval-large-wood-box.name: Medieval Large Wood Box
medieval-large-wood-box.description: Keep your things in this medieval themed wooden storage box. Stores up to 48 items.

medium-frankenstein-head.name: Medium Frankenstein Head
medium-frankenstein-head.description:
A balanced head.

Combined at a Frankenstein Table to create your very own monster.

medium-frankenstein-legs.name: Medium Frankenstein Legs
medium-frankenstein-legs.description:
A balanced set of legs.

Combined at a Frankenstein Table to create your very own monster.

medium-frankenstein-torso.name: Medium Frankenstein Torso
medium-frankenstein-torso.description:
A balanced torso.

Combined at a Frankenstein Table to create your very own monster.

medium-loot-bag.name: Medium Loot Bag
medium-loot-bag.description: Contains medium level loot, Collect 10 to upgrade to a Large loot bag, containing the best loot

medium-present.name: Medium Present
medium-present.description: A medium present, might be good! Collect 5 to upgrade to a larger present.

medium-quality-carburetor.name: Medium Quality Carburetor
medium-quality-carburetor.description: A medium quality carburetor for a combustion engine. Mixes air and fuel to the proper ratio.

medium-quality-crankshaft.name: Medium Quality Crankshaft
medium-quality-crankshaft.description: A medium quality crankshaft for a combustion engine. Converts piston movement into rotational motion.

medium-quality-pistons.name: Medium Quality Pistons
medium-quality-pistons.description: Medium quality pistons for a combustion engine. Pistons convert expanding combustion gases into the motion that turns a crankshaft.

medium-quality-spark-plugs.name: Medium Quality Spark Plugs
medium-quality-spark-plugs.description: Medium quality spark plugs for a combustion engine. Spark plugs ignite the fuel/air mixture to move the pistons.

medium-quality-valves.name: Medium Quality Valves
medium-quality-valves.description: Medium quality poppet valves for a combustion engine. Valves control the intake and exhaust flow.

medium-rechargeable-battery.name: Medium Rechargeable Battery
medium-rechargeable-battery.description: A medium rechargeable battery. Must have a minimum charge of 5 seconds to discharge. Can be wired in series. Max 80% charging efficiency.

medium-wooden-sign.name: Medium Wooden Sign
medium-wooden-sign.description: A 2-meter by 1-meter wooden sign that you can write on.

megaphone.name: Megaphone
megaphone.description: A megaphone that lets you broadcast your voice. [attack] to activate your voice.

memory-cell.name: Memory Cell
memory-cell.description: Stores an electrical state (SET or RESET) and outputs it until changed. The foundation of toggle and latch circuits — pair with buttons to create flip-flop logic.

metal-armor-insert.name: Metal Armor Insert
metal-armor-insert.description: Metal insert for crafted clothing and armor, provides extra protection from projectiles.

metal-blade.name: Metal Blade
metal-blade.description: A Metal Blade for making melee weapons.

metal-chest-plate.name: Metal Chest Plate
metal-chest-plate.description: A metal plate covering your torso, provides excellent protection from all forms of attacks.

metal-detector.name: Metal Detector
metal-detector.description: Detects hidden metal objects. When the light flashes or you hear a beep, aim to search for buried items. Hold Reload to change detection range.

metal-facemask.name: Metal Facemask
metal-facemask.description: A protective facemask which provides the user with excellent head protection from all forms of attacks.

metal-fragments.name: Metal Fragments
metal-fragments.description: The most used crafting material in Rust, produced by smelting Metal Ore in a furnace. Used in virtually every mid-to-late game crafting recipe.

metal-ore.name: Metal Ore
metal-ore.description: Mined from grey and blue-tinted metal ore nodes found throughout the map. Must be smelted in a furnace or electric furnace to produce Metal Fragments.

metal-pipe.name: Metal Pipe
metal-pipe.description: Hollow metal pipe sections found in barrels. A versatile component used in a wide range of weapons, rockets, and utility crafting recipes.

metal-shield.name: Metal Shield
metal-shield.description: A large sturdy metal shield, keeps arrows and bullets at bay. Usable with single handed weapons and tools.

metal-spring.name: Metal Spring
metal-spring.description: Coiled metal springs looted from barrels. Used in precision-crafted weapons that require spring-loaded mechanisms such as rifles and crossbows.

microphone-stand.name: Microphone Stand
microphone-stand.description: A powered microphone that lets you broadcast your voice. Press [+attack2] to change voice mode between high and low pitch.

military-flame-thrower.name: Military Flame Thrower
