military-flame-thrower.description: A Military grade flamethrower. Uses low grade fuel as ammunition.

military-silencer.name: Military Silencer
military-silencer.description: Significantly reduces the sound of gunfire, and completely removes any visible muzzle flash.

minecart-planter.name: Minecart Planter
minecart-planter.description: A small planter with enough room to plant 2 seeds.

miners-hat.name: Miners Hat
miners-hat.description: A leather cap with a flashlight attached. It uses Low Grade Fuel and can be activated from the inventory.

mini-crossbow.name: Mini Crossbow
mini-crossbow.description: A very accurate ranged weapon with a rotating barrel.

mini-fridge.name: Mini Fridge
mini-fridge.description: Ideal for preserving food and keeping items cool.

minicopter.name: Minicopter
minicopter.description: A small two-seat helicopter. Fast air travel but loud and easily spotted by other players.

minigun.name: Minigun
minigun.description: A military issue belt-fed machine gun that must be spun up to fire. Fires rapidly at the expense of movement speed.

minigun-ammo-pack.name: Minigun Ammo Pack
minigun-ammo-pack.description: A backpack designed to store ammunition for a minigun.

minnows.name: Minnows
minnows.description: A Small group of edible fish.

mixing-table.name: Mixing Table
mixing-table.description: Used for mixing teas, gunpowder, low grade fuel, and explosives. Requires ingredients and a Workbench to unlock advanced recipes.

mlrs-aiming-module.name: MLRS Aiming Module
mlrs-aiming-module.description: An aiming system computer module for an MLRS vehicle.

mlrs-rocket.name: MLRS Rocket
mlrs-rocket.description: A rocket intended for use in an MLRS (Multiple Launch Rocket System).

mobile-phone.name: Mobile Phone
mobile-phone.description: A mobile phone that lets you place calls from anywhere. Truly cutting edge Cobalt technology. Use [attack] to access the dialer.

modular-car-lift.name: Modular Car Lift
modular-car-lift.description: This allows you to modify modular vehicles

molotov-cocktail.name: Molotov Cocktail
molotov-cocktail.description: A glass bottle filled with low grade fuel. Smashes and spreads fire when it lands, dealing high damage to wood structures and players.

motorbike.name: Motorbike
motorbike.description: A rideable motorbike. Fast and nimble, seats one player. Good for quick cross-map travel.

mounted-ballista.name: Mounted Ballista
mounted-ballista.description: A ballista mounted on wheels, designed for mobility and capable of firing bolts at distant targets. Can be towed by horses.

movember-moustache.name: Movember Moustache
movember-moustache.description: A magnificent moustache (it acts as a hairy bandana) - all proceeds go to Movember, a charity promoting men's health awareness,

mp5a4.name: MP5A4
mp5a4.description: Fast-firing submachine gun with manageable recoil. Excellent for close-range combat.

mr-spice-can.name: Mr Spice Can
mr-spice-can.description: A delicious and refreshing beverage, with a delightful spicy undertone.

multiple-grenade-launcher.name: Multiple Grenade Launcher
multiple-grenade-launcher.description: Semi-automatic 6-shot grenade launcher. Rapid explosive rounds excel at room clearing, door camping, and suppressing clusters of players.

mummy-mask.name: Mummy Mask
mummy-mask.description: A classic halloween costume mask which provides decent protection.

mushroom.name: Mushroom
mushroom.description: A Mushroom found on the ground. Eating it provides a small boost to health, hunger, and thirst.

muzzle-boost.name: Muzzle Boost
muzzle-boost.description: Increases weapon fire rate by channeling gasses back into the weapon cycling it faster, at the cost of bullet accuracy.

muzzle-brake.name: Muzzle Brake
muzzle-brake.description: Lowers recoil felt by the operator but can make bullet path more unpredictable and dealing slightly less damage to your foes.

nailgun.name: Nailgun
nailgun.description: Nailgun — fires nails rapidly at close range. Mainly a construction tool but usable in combat. Uses nailgun nails. RustLab.

nailgun-nails.name: Nailgun Nails
nailgun-nails.description: Nailgun Nails: Standard ammo for the Nailgun. Fires rapidly at close range. Cheap to craft. RustLab.

naval-scientist-suit.name: Naval Scientist Suit
naval-scientist-suit.description: A hazmat suit made from radiation resistant rubber.

nest-hat.name: Nest Hat
nest-hat.description: An extremely silly easter nest hat with googly eyes.

new-year-gong.name: New Year Gong
new-year-gong.description: Ring in the Lunar new year with a massive gong!

night-vision-goggles.name: Night Vision Goggles
night-vision-goggles.description: Enables vision at nighttime by projecting and amplifying infrared light.The batteries can be recharged at a Lvl 2 workbench. Cannot be worn with a helmet.

note.name: Note
note.description: A scrap of paper for leaving notes.

nvgm-scientist-suit.name: NVGM Scientist Suit
nvgm-scientist-suit.description: A hazmat suit made from radiation resistant rubber.

obsidian-bone-knife.name: Obsidian Bone Knife
obsidian-bone-knife.description: Melee weapon crafted from obsidian. Good for harvesting carcases.

oil-filter-silencer.name: Oil Filter Silencer
oil-filter-silencer.description: Significantly reduces the sound of gunfire, and completely removes any visible muzzle flash. Fashioned out of an old oil filter, this won't last long.

one-sided-town-sign-post.name: One Sided Town Sign Post
one-sided-town-sign-post.description: A one sided town sign post, that you can plant into terrain.

or-switch.name: OR Switch
or-switch.description: Outputs power when at least one of its two inputs is active. Useful for combining multiple trigger sources — such as two separate motion sensors — into a single output.

orange-boomer.name: Orange Boomer
orange-boomer.description: A very large mortar type firework with an orange starburst

orange-roughy.name: Orange Roughy
orange-roughy.description: A rare fish found in the depths of the ocean. Eats everything, so you never know what you'll find in it's stomach.

orchid.name: Orchid
orchid.description: A blooming orchid grown from orchid seeds. Used as decoration in your base.

orchid-clone.name: Orchid Clone
orchid-clone.description: A clipping of an orchid plant.

orchid-seed.name: Orchid Seed
orchid-seed.description: Orchid seeds can be found when picking wild Orchids.

ornate-frame-xxl.name: Ornate Frame XXL
ornate-frame-xxl.description: An extra extra large ornate frame

outbreak-sprayer.name: Outbreak Sprayer
outbreak-sprayer.description: An outbreak sprayer used by scientists

ox-mask.name: Ox Mask
ox-mask.description: An Ox mask to celebrate the 2021 Lunar New Year.

paddle.name: Paddle
paddle.description: A versatile melee weapon that can also be used to paddle a kayak.

paddling-pool.name: Paddling Pool
paddling-pool.description: A small inflatable pool that you can fill up with water.

paintable-reactive-target.name: Paintable Reactive Target
paintable-reactive-target.description: A reactive target practice in which you can paint whatever you want

paintball.name: Paintball
paintball.description: Paintball ammo for the Paintball Gun. Non-lethal rounds used for marking and recreational play. RustLab.

paintball-gun.name: Paintball Gun
paintball-gun.description: An air gun that uses compressed gas to fire and make targets works of art.

painted-egg.name: Painted Egg
painted-egg.description: Some simple painted eggs. Collect 10 to upgrade to a bronze egg

pan-flute.name: Pan Flute
pan-flute.description: A set of repurposed PVC pipes that can be used to play a variety of melodies.

pants.name: Pants
pants.description: A pair of pants, highly capable undergarment for your legs. Great all round protection from damage and the elements.

paper.name: Paper
paper.description: Paper, a ingredient for Building plan and Note.

paper-map.name: Paper Map
paper-map.description: Helps you navigate the map. Annotate by right-clicking and drawing on it. Drag the map into your hotbar to access it quickly in game.

parachute.name: Parachute
parachute.description: Once equipped, press [+jump] while in mid-air to pull the cord. Must be repacked after use. Must be at least 15m above the ground in order to deploy.

party-hat.name: Party Hat
party-hat.description: A very stupid looking party hat

pattern-boomer.name: Pattern Boomer
pattern-boomer.description: A special boomer which allows you light up the night sky with a custom pattern that you draw. Multiple colors and altitude settings are available.

photograph.name: Photograph
photograph.description: A photograph taken with an instant camera.

pickaxe.name: Pickaxe
pickaxe.description: A Pickaxe, useful for gathering ore from rocks.

pickles.name: Pickles
pickles.description: Cucumbers in a vinegar bath, jarred by an amateur. Eat at your own risk.

piercer-bolt.name: Piercer Bolt
piercer-bolt.description: A piercing bolt for a ballista, capable of penetrating armored vehicles.

pilot-hazmat.name: Pilot Hazmat
pilot-hazmat.description: A hazmat suit made from a fighter pilot's flight suit.

pinata.name: Pinata
pinata.description: A birthday piñata. Hang it up and hit it to release the loot inside. Found during the Birthday event each year.

pipe-tool.name: Pipe Tool
pipe-tool.description: A tool for making connections between industrial objects. Aim at an input/output handle and click another handle to form a connection.

pistol-bullet.name: Pistol Bullet
pistol-bullet.description: Ammunition for a Pistol. Loses velocity when fired over long distances resulting in slightly decreased damage.

pitchfork.name: Pitchfork
pitchfork.description: A 3 pronged pitchfork. Extremely easy to hit targets with.

pitchfork-bolt.name: Pitchfork Bolt
pitchfork-bolt.description: A wide-impact bolt for a ballista, covering a large area while dealing moderate damage.

plank.name: Plank
plank.description: Crude boarding plank thrown together from ruined floorboards, watch out for splinters.

plant-fiber.name: Plant Fiber
plant-fiber.description: Fiber from dead plants. Can be composted.

plumbers-trumpet.name: Plumber's Trumpet
plumbers-trumpet.description: Toot your own horn with this brassy improvised Trumpet.

pookie-bear.name: Pookie Bear
pookie-bear.description: A companion that reminds you of your youth.

pork-pie.name: Pork Pie
pork-pie.description: Tempting pork pie, provides a boost to hunger, health and hydration. Improves healing rate from other sources for a short time.

portable-boom-box.name: Portable Boom Box
portable-boom-box.description: A portable Boom Box that can play tapes and internet audio streams. [attack] to start/stop and [attack2] to modify settings.

portable-easel.name: Portable Easel
portable-easel.description: A portable easel for painting plein air!

portrait-photo-frame.name: Portrait Photo Frame
portrait-photo-frame.description: A portrait oriented canvas for artists paintings.

portrait-picture-frame.name: Portrait Picture Frame
portrait-picture-frame.description: A portrait oriented canvas for artists paintings.

potato.name: Potato
potato.description: A potato. Eating it provides a small boost to health, hunger, and thirst. Can be grown from potato seeds.

potato-clone.name: Potato Clone
potato-clone.description: A Clipping of a Potato Plant.

potato-seed.name: Potato Seed
potato-seed.description: Potato Seeds can be planted in the ground or a planter box to grow additional food. Watering with large quantities of water speeds up growth.

powered-water-purifier.name: Powered Water Purifier
powered-water-purifier.description: A device that converts salt water to fresh water while powered.

pressure-pad.name: Pressure Pad
pressure-pad.description: A floor-mounted sensor that triggers when any player, NPC, or large animal steps on it. Often used as a trip-wire style alert or to trigger traps.

prisoner-hood.name: Prisoner Hood
prisoner-hood.description: A hood for prisoners, restricts vision.

propane-explosive-bomb.name: Propane Explosive Bomb
propane-explosive-bomb.description: An explosive propane-filled keg, devastating to structures. Can be placed or used as a projectile in a catapult.

prototype-17.name: Prototype 17
prototype-17.description: A protype pistol with a built-in 3 round burst fire mode. Strong in close quarters. Swap between single shot and burst with [+firemode]

prototype-hatchet.name: Prototype Hatchet
prototype-hatchet.description: A prototype field hatchet, useful for gathering wood

prototype-pickaxe.name: Prototype Pickaxe
prototype-pickaxe.description: A prototype field pickaxe. Useful for gathering ore from rocks.

ptz-cctv-camera.name: PTZ CCTV Camera
ptz-cctv-camera.description: A CCTV Camera system can be used for realtime surveillance and security when paired with the Computer Station. This camera has pan, tilt, and zoom capability.

pump-shotgun.name: Pump Shotgun
pump-shotgun.description: Devastatingly powerful at close range. One of the best early-game weapons.

pumpkin.name: Pumpkin
pumpkin.description: An edible vegetable that can also be worn as a hat. Eating it provides a small boost to health, hunger, and thirst.

pumpkin-basket.name: Pumpkin Basket
pumpkin-basket.description: A pumpkin basket to help you collect candy much faster during Trick or Treat events with left click. Use right click to throw candy

pumpkin-pie.name: Pumpkin Pie
pumpkin-pie.description: Spooky pumpkin pie, provides a boost to health, hunger and hydration. Increases maximum health for a short time.

pumpkin-plant-clone.name: Pumpkin Plant Clone
pumpkin-plant-clone.description: A Clipping of a pumpkin plant.

pumpkin-seed.name: Pumpkin Seed
pumpkin-seed.description: Pumpkin Seeds can be planted in the ground or a planter box to grow additional food. Watering with large quantities of water speeds up growth.

pure-anti-rad-tea.name: Pure Anti-Rad Tea
pure-anti-rad-tea.description: A pure tea that provides hydration and temporarily increases your resistance to radiation a large amount.

pure-cooling-tea.name: Pure Cooling Tea
pure-cooling-tea.description: A pure cooling tea that temporarily decreases your max and core temperature.

pure-crafting-quality-tea.name: Pure Crafting Quality Tea
pure-crafting-quality-tea.description: A pure crafting tea. provides hydration and increases the chances of a higher quality crafting outcome for a short time.

pure-harvesting-tea.name: Pure Harvesting Tea
pure-harvesting-tea.description: A pure harvesting tea, provides hydration and temporarily increases the amount of resources you receive from harvesting corpses a large amount.

pure-healing-tea.name: Pure Healing Tea
pure-healing-tea.description: A pure healing tea, provides hydration and heals you a large amount over time.

pure-max-health-tea.name: Pure Max Health Tea
pure-max-health-tea.description: A pure health tea, provides hydration and temporarily boosts maximum health a large amount.

pure-ore-tea.name: Pure Ore Tea
pure-ore-tea.description: A pure ore tea, provides hydration and temporarily increases your yield when harvesting ores a large amount.

pure-rad-removal-tea.name: Pure Rad. Removal Tea
pure-rad-removal-tea.description: A tea that removes some radiation.

pure-scrap-tea.name: Pure Scrap Tea
pure-scrap-tea.description: A pure scrap tea, temporarily increases the amount of scrap you receive from barrels a large amount.

pure-warming-tea.name: Pure Warming Tea
pure-warming-tea.description: A pure warming tea that temporarily increases both your core and minimum temperature.

pure-wood-tea.name: Pure Wood Tea
pure-wood-tea.description: A pure wood tea, temporarily increases the yield from cutting trees a large amount.

purple-sunglasses.name: Purple Sunglasses
purple-sunglasses.description: Sunglasses - Gained from Rust's first Twitch drop.

python-revolver.name: Python Revolver
python-revolver.description: Premium revolver with high per-shot damage and accuracy. A favorite for mid-game roaming.

rabbit-mask.name: Rabbit Mask
rabbit-mask.description: A Beautifully crafted Rabbit mask to celebrate the 2023 Lunar New Year

rad-removal-tea.name: Rad. Removal Tea
rad-removal-tea.description: A tea that removes some radiation.

radiation-dart.name: Radiation Dart
radiation-dart.description: A dart that applies stackable radiation.

radioactive-water.name: Radioactive Water
radioactive-water.description: Glowing water. Consuming will damage your health and irradiate you.

rail-road-planter.name: Rail Road Planter
rail-road-planter.description: A large planter with enough room to plant 9 seeds.

rand-switch.name: RAND Switch
rand-switch.description: This switch will allow passthrough based on a random number. Each time the SET input receives power it will roll true or false to allow passthrough

rat-mask.name: Rat Mask
rat-mask.description: A Beautifully crafted bronze and gold Rat mask to celebrate the 2020 Lunar New Year. This item replaces the wolf headdress.

raw-bear-meat.name: Raw Bear Meat
raw-bear-meat.description: Raw Bear Meat. Eating it will damage your health, try cooking it first.

raw-big-cat-meat.name: Raw Big Cat Meat
raw-big-cat-meat.description: Raw Big Cat Meat. Eating it will damage your health, try cooking it first.

raw-chicken-breast.name: Raw Chicken Breast
raw-chicken-breast.description: Raw chicken breast. Eating it will damage your health, try cooking it first.

raw-crocodile-meat.name: Raw Crocodile Meat
raw-crocodile-meat.description: Raw Crocodile Meat. Eating it will damage your health, try cooking it first.

raw-deer-meat.name: Raw Deer Meat
raw-deer-meat.description: Raw Deer Meat. Eating it will damage your health, try cooking it first.

raw-horse-meat.name: Raw Horse Meat
raw-horse-meat.description: Raw Horse Meat. Eating it will damage your health, try cooking it first.

raw-human-meat.name: Raw Human Meat
raw-human-meat.description: Raw human meat. Consuming will damage your health.

raw-pork.name: Raw Pork
raw-pork.description: Raw pork. Eating it will damage your health, try cooking it first.

raw-snake-meat.name: Raw Snake Meat
raw-snake-meat.description: Raw Snake Meat. Eating it will damage your health, try cooking it first.

raw-wolf-meat.name: Raw Wolf Meat
raw-wolf-meat.description: Raw Wolf Meat. Eating it will damage your health, try cooking it first.

reactive-target.name: Reactive Target
reactive-target.description: A reactive target that knocks down when hit, can be reset.

rear-seats-vehicle-module.name: Rear Seats Vehicle Module
rear-seats-vehicle-module.description: Single module seating for two passengers.

red-berry.name: Red Berry
red-berry.description: A red berry. Can be eaten or used in mixing table recipes to create teas.

red-berry-clone.name: Red Berry Clone
red-berry-clone.description: A clipping of a Red Berry Plant.

red-berry-seed.name: Red Berry Seed
red-berry-seed.description: Red Berry Seeds can be planted in the ground or a planter box to grow additional food. Watering with large quantities of water speeds up growth.

red-boomer.name: Red Boomer
red-boomer.description: A very large mortar type firework with a red starburst

red-keycard.name: Red Keycard
red-keycard.description: A keycard with advanced clearance, grants access to top level areas

red-roman-candle.name: Red Roman Candle
red-roman-candle.description: A small repeating firework, shoots a series of red balls into the air

red-volcano-firework.name: Red Volcano Firework
red-volcano-firework.description: Emits a beautiful shower of red sparks

reindeer-antlers.name: Reindeer Antlers
reindeer-antlers.description: A festive reindeer antlers headband and nose.

reinforced-wooden-shield.name: Reinforced Wooden Shield
reinforced-wooden-shield.description: A basic wooden shield with added protection, keeps you safe but not for long. Usable with single handed weapons and tools.

repair-bench.name: Repair Bench
repair-bench.description: You can repair your items here for a fraction of their construction cost. You may also use this to apply new skins to existing items.

research-paper.name: Research Paper
research-paper.description: Use this item in a Research Bench to create blueprints of items.

research-table.name: Research Table
research-table.description: You can use this table to learn how to permanently craft items you have found in exchange for scrap.

revolver.name: Revolver
revolver.description: Basic revolver. A solid T1 option when you need something more than a rock.

rf-broadcaster.name: RF Broadcaster
rf-broadcaster.description: Transmits a radio frequency (RF) signal on a user-configured frequency when powered. Any RF Receiver set to the same frequency will activate when this broadcaster is on.

rf-pager.name: RF Pager
rf-pager.description: An RF Pager. An audible tone will be produced when a signal is picked up on the listening frequency. Can be set to silent mode.

rf-receiver.name: RF Receiver
rf-receiver.description: Listens for an RF signal on a configured frequency and passes power to connected outputs when the matching broadcaster is active. Enables wireless electrical circuits.

rf-transmitter.name: RF Transmitter
rf-transmitter.description: A hand held RF signal broadcaster. Left click to broadcast. Configurable with right mouse.

rifle-body.name: Rifle Body
rifle-body.description: The firing mechanism of a rifle. Used in construction of a weapon that can fire 5.56 ammo fully automatic.

riot-helmet.name: Riot Helmet
riot-helmet.description: A makeshift riot Helmet. Great at deflecting melee attacks.

road-sign-gloves.name: Road Sign Gloves
road-sign-gloves.description: Gloves made out of metal, offer a good amount of protection to the upper body.

road-sign-jacket.name: Road Sign Jacket
road-sign-jacket.description: A shoddy piece of body armor made from roadsigns.

road-sign-kilt.name: Road Sign Kilt
road-sign-kilt.description: A shoddy piece of leg armor made from roadsigns. Moderate protection from melee and projectiles.

road-signs.name: Road Signs
road-signs.description: Some road signs made of metal.

roadsign-horse-armor.name: Roadsign Horse Armor
roadsign-horse-armor.description: A full body armor for a horse. Provides strong protection for you and your steed, at the cost of greatly reduced movement speed.

rock.name: Rock
rock.description: A Rock. The most basic melee weapon and gathering tool.

rocket.name: Rocket
rocket.description: The standard rocket fired from a Rocket Launcher. Deals heavy explosive damage to structures and is the most sulfur-efficient method for raiding stone and higher-tier walls.

rocket-launcher.name: Rocket Launcher
rocket-launcher.description: The ultimate raid and anti-helicopter weapon. Rockets deal massive area damage.

rocking-chair.name: Rocking Chair
rocking-chair.description: A rocking chair that responds to your input. Don't fire whilst seated.

ronald-mcdonald-house-uk-plushie.name: Ronald McDonald House UK Plushie
ronald-mcdonald-house-uk-plushie.description: A plush sold on the Rust store in October 2025 to support Ronald McDonald House Charities UK, providing accommodation for families near hospitals.

root-combiner.name: Root Combiner
root-combiner.description: Combines two separate power sources into a single output line, summing their wattages. Allows you to merge solar, wind, and battery power into one unified circuit.

rope.name: Rope
rope.description: A woven rope component found in barrels and crates. Used in a handful of essential crafting recipes including the Sleeping Bag and Fishing Rod.

rose.name: Rose
rose.description: A rose. Can be planted from rose seeds or given as a decorative item in your base.

rose-clone.name: Rose Clone
rose-clone.description: A clipping of a rose plant.

rose-seed.name: Rose Seed
rose-seed.description: Rose seeds can be found when picking wild Roses.

rotten-apple.name: Rotten Apple
rotten-apple.description: A rotten apple. Eating it currently provides a tiny boost to health, hunger, and thirst.

rug.name: Rug
rug.description: A decorative rug that can be placed on walls, floors, and ceilings. Provides comfort when in close proximity.

rustig-egg-blue.name: Rustigé Egg - Blue
rustig-egg-blue.description: A beautiful hand crafted white gold and sapphire encrusted egg, with a miniature monument contained inside.

rustig-egg-cerulean.name: Rustigé Egg - Cerulean
rustig-egg-cerulean.description: A beautiful hand crafted cerulean and gold egg, with a miniature cargo ship scene contained inside.

rustig-egg-green.name: Rustigé Egg - Green
rustig-egg-green.description: A beautiful hand crafted gold and green egg, with a miniature traincart contained inside.

rustig-egg-ivory.name: Rustigé Egg - Ivory
rustig-egg-ivory.description: A beautiful hand crafted Ivory and gold egg, with a miniature monument contained inside.

rustig-egg-purple.name: Rustigé Egg - Purple
rustig-egg-purple.description: A beautiful hand crafted purple egg with gold lace, a miniature offshore monument is contained inside.

rustig-egg-red.name: Rustigé Egg - Red
rustig-egg-red.description: An exquisite hand crafted gold and diamond egg. When opened, a very special melody can be heard as you observe an intricate representation of your favorite monument.

rustig-egg-white.name: Rustigé Egg - White
rustig-egg-white.description: A beautiful hand crafted gold and white egg, with a miniature underwater lab scene contained inside.

saddle-bag.name: Saddle bag
saddle-bag.description: Equipping this saddle bag will add extra storage space on your horse

sail.name: Sail
sail.description: A slow but effective boat sail, made from scraps of fabric hastily stitched together. More sails will generate more speed.

salmon.name: Salmon
salmon.description: A large Salmon, found in fresh and salt water. Eats everything, so you never know what you'll find in it's stomach.

salt-water.name: Salt Water
salt-water.description: Water with a high salt content. Consuming will damage your health.

salvaged-axe.name: Salvaged Axe
salvaged-axe.description: A high-yield resource gathering axe. Slower than the Hatchet.

salvaged-cleaver.name: Salvaged Cleaver
salvaged-cleaver.description: A powerful 2-handed melee weapon with high damage.

salvaged-ejector-seat.name: Salvaged Ejector Seat
salvaged-ejector-seat.description: A chair made from an ejector seat. A decorative item which provides comfort while seated. Stays put.

salvaged-hammer.name: Salvaged Hammer
salvaged-hammer.description: A Hammer made from a bunch of other crap.

salvaged-sword.name: Salvaged Sword
salvaged-sword.description: A powerful melee weapon made from a filed-down wrench. Great durability, good damage.

sam-ammo.name: SAM Ammo
sam-ammo.description: Ammunition for a SAM Site. This missile contains a rudimentary guidance system to help it navigate through strong winds.

sam-site.name: SAM Site
sam-site.description: An anti-air missile battery that automatically targets and destroys helicopters, supply signals, and other airborne objects. A key defense against air-dropped raids and helicopters.

santa-beard.name: Santa Beard
santa-beard.description: A santa beard. Ho Ho ho. This item acts as a hairy bandana.

santa-hat.name: Santa Hat
santa-hat.description: A santa hat. Ho Ho ho.

sardine.name: Sardine
sardine.description: A small oily fish, commonly found in large schools.

satchel-charge.name: Satchel Charge
satchel-charge.description: The Satchel Charge is a mid-game raiding explosive made from Beancan Grenades. Cheaper than C4 or rockets but has a chance to dud and requires more charges for higher-tier structures.

scarecrow.name: Scarecrow
scarecrow.description: Get into the halloween spirit with this decorative deployable item.

scatter-dart.name: Scatter Dart
scatter-dart.description: A spread shot dart that fires multiple smaller darts.

scattershot.name: Scattershot
scattershot.description: A cluster of heavy rock projectiles for a catapult. Wide spread, pure kinetic damage on impact.

scientist-suit.name: Scientist Suit
scientist-suit.description: A hazmat suit made from radiation resistant rubber.

scrap.name: Scrap
scrap.description: The primary currency of Rust. Found in barrels and crates across the map, and obtained by recycling components and items. Used at the Research Table and Workbench to unlock blueprints.

search-light.name: Search Light
search-light.description: A powerful rotating spotlight that automatically tracks and illuminates nearby players in its cone of light. Useful for perimeter surveillance and deterrence at night.

secretlab-chair.name: Secretlab Chair
secretlab-chair.description: A luxurious, comfortable chair for long sessions of CCTV watching.

sedan.name: Sedan
sedan.description: A 4-module modular vehicle in sedan configuration. Build and customize with interchangeable vehicle modules.

seismic-sensor.name: Seismic Sensor
seismic-sensor.description: A small device that detects vibrations within a set range. Outputs different power values depending on the explosive type detected nearby.

semi-automatic-body.name: Semi Automatic Body
semi-automatic-body.description: The firing mechanism of a semi automatic weapon.

semi-automatic-pistol.name: Semi-Automatic Pistol
semi-automatic-pistol.description: Reliable sidearm. Easy to craft and effective in the early game.

semi-automatic-rifle.name: Semi-Automatic Rifle
semi-automatic-rifle.description: Mid-tier semi-auto rifle. A solid stepping stone before crafting full auto.

sewing-kit.name: Sewing Kit
sewing-kit.description: A Sewing kit. Used to make advanced clothing.

shirt.name: Shirt
shirt.description: A smart casual shirt. Might make you look more trustworthy. Moderate clothing for protection against damage and the elements.

shorts.name: Shorts
shorts.description: Trusty pair of shorts. Provides only basic protection but better than nothing. Worse than full-length counterparts for cold resistance.

shotgun-trap.name: Shotgun Trap
shotgun-trap.description: A shotgun trap triggered by movement, place near doorways and load with handmade shells.

shovel.name: Shovel
shovel.description: A shovel for digging up stuff

shovel-bass.name: Shovel Bass
shovel-bass.description: Use this stringed together shovel to play some deep, deep tunes.

shutter-frame-xxl.name: Shutter Frame XXL
shutter-frame-xxl.description: An extra extra large shutter frame

sickle.name: Sickle
sickle.description: A very sharp curved cutting weapon. While its traditional role was to cut grass, this tool is also extremely versatile at cutting throats, perhaps trees, too.

siege-tower.name: Siege Tower
siege-tower.description: A rolling siege tower, providing cover and access to enemy bases. Can be locked with your own door. Can be towed by horses.

silly-horse-mask.name: Silly Horse Mask
silly-horse-mask.description: A silly rubber horse mask to celebrate Lunar New Year 2026. Comes in three varieties.

silver-egg.name: Silver Egg
silver-egg.description: A Silver Egg. Contains medium level loot, Collect 10 to upgrade to a gold Egg

simple-handmade-sight.name: Simple Handmade Sight
simple-handmade-sight.description: A poorly made sight, slightly better than iron sights.

single-horse-saddle.name: Single Horse Saddle
single-horse-saddle.description: A horse saddle with one seat. Having this item allows you to claim a horse in a stable by holding E and selecting the "Claim" option

single-sign-post.name: Single Sign Post
single-sign-post.description: A single sign post that you can plant into terrain.

skinning-knife.name: Skinning Knife
skinning-knife.description: A sharp skinning knife. Extremely good at harvesting flesh and can produce trophies that can be mounted on Hunting Trophies.

sks.name: SKS
sks.description: SKS — a military-grade semi-automatic rifle with good accuracy. Fires 5.56 rifle ammo. Crafting, ammo & recycle. RustLab.

skull-door-knocker.name: Skull Door Knocker
skull-door-knocker.description: A spooky heavy iron door knocker. Its haunted skull will produce flames when distrubed.

skull-fire-pit.name: Skull Fire Pit
skull-fire-pit.description: Enjoy burning your enemies remnants to ashes with this Halloween exclusive! Provides warmth and light, and you can cook with it.

skull-spikes.name: Skull Spikes
skull-spikes.description: A spike of several skulls. Very spooky.

skull-trophy.name: Skull Trophy
skull-trophy.description: A decorative mount that can hold the skull of a friend or foe.

sky-lantern.name: Sky Lantern
sky-lantern.description: A set of beautiful sky lanterns. Comes in 5 colors. Can be launched in any direction. Has one inventory slot. Can be Ignited with a lit torch.

sky-lantern-green.name: Sky Lantern - Green
sky-lantern-green.description: A decorative green sky lantern that floats into the air when lit. Craft from cloth and wood for festive base decoration.

sky-lantern-orange.name: Sky Lantern - Orange
sky-lantern-orange.description: A decorative orange sky lantern that floats into the air when lit. Craft from cloth and wood for festive base decoration.

sky-lantern-purple.name: Sky Lantern - Purple
sky-lantern-purple.description: A decorative purple sky lantern that floats into the air when lit. Craft from cloth and wood for festive base decoration.

sky-lantern-red.name: Sky Lantern - Red
sky-lantern-red.description: A decorative red sky lantern that floats into the air when lit. Craft from cloth and wood for festive base decoration.

sled.name: Sled
sled.description: A wooden sled to quickly travel down snowy hills.

sleeping-bag.name: Sleeping Bag
sleeping-bag.description: A sleeping bag. Placing this will give you or an assigned player a place to respawn, with a long cooldown.

small-boat-engine.name: Small Boat Engine
small-boat-engine.description: A punchy boat engine made from scavenged parts, not good for the environment. More engines means more speed.

small-generator.name: Small Generator
small-generator.description: A portable fuel-powered generator that outputs a steady 40W. Requires Low Grade Fuel to operate, consuming approximately 1 LGF every 45 seconds.

small-hunting-trophy.name: Small Hunting Trophy
small-hunting-trophy.description: A trophy stand to mount the head of killed animals or enemies.

small-loot-bag.name: Small Loot Bag
small-loot-bag.description: Open for a surprise, or collect 10 to upgrade to a medium loot bag containing better loot!

small-oil-refinery.name: Small Oil Refinery
small-oil-refinery.description: A small refinery which can produce Low Grade Fuel from Crude Oil.

small-planter-box.name: Small Planter Box
small-planter-box.description: A small planter with enough room to plant 3 seeds.

small-present.name: Small Present
small-present.description: A small stocking stuffer present, Collect 10 to upgrade to a larger present.

small-ramp.name: Small Ramp
small-ramp.description: Deployable wooden ramp cobbled together from recycled doors, probably sturdy enough. Unfolds for boarding enemy vessels.

small-rechargeable-battery.name: Small Rechargeable Battery
small-rechargeable-battery.description: A small rechargeable battery. Must have a minimum charge of 5 seconds to discharge. Can be wired in series. Max 80% charging efficiency.

small-shark.name: Small Shark
small-shark.description: A small, surprisingly aggressive deep sea predator. Eats everything, so you never know what you'll find in it's stomach.

small-spike-trap.name: Small Spike Trap
small-spike-trap.description: A small improvised trap that injures and slows anyone who steps on it.

small-stash.name: Small Stash
small-stash.description: A hidden, burried stash to keep your items safe. After placing, return to the stash and aim at the ground where you hid it and it will reveal itself.

small-stocking.name: Small Stocking
small-stocking.description: A small stocking. Hang it by a fire and you might just get a gift! Collect 6 to upgrade to a SUPER Stocking.

small-trout.name: Small Trout
small-trout.description: A Small Trout. Good for a few meals.

small-water-bottle.name: Small Water Bottle
small-water-bottle.description: A Small Water Bottle. Left click to drink, right click to fill from water sources, or to pour out.

small-wooden-sign.name: Small Wooden Sign
small-wooden-sign.description: A 1-meter by 0.5-meter wooden sign that you can write on.

smart-alarm.name: Smart Alarm
smart-alarm.description: Sends a push notification to your phone via the Rust+ companion app whenever it receives a power signal. Pair with any sensor to receive real-time base breach alerts.

smart-switch.name: Smart Switch
smart-switch.description: A remotely controllable switch that can be toggled on or off through the Rust+ companion app from anywhere in the world. Great for controlling lights and defenses while offline.

smg-body.name: SMG Body
smg-body.description: The firing mechanism of a submachinegun. Used in construction of a weapon that can fire pistol ammo fully automatic.

smoke-grenade.name: Smoke Grenade
smoke-grenade.description: Produces a large cloud of opaque greyish white smoke.

smoke-rocket-wip.name: Smoke Rocket WIP!!!!
smoke-rocket-wip.description: Emits thick, visibility blocking smoke upon impact.

snake-mask.name: Snake mask
snake-mask.description: A Beautifully crafted Snake mask to celebrate the 2025 Lunar New Year

snake-venom.name: Snake Venom
snake-venom.description: The venom of a snake. Used to create Incapacitate darts.

snap-trap.name: Snap Trap
snap-trap.description: A metal trap that can injure or even kill people when stepped on. Can be picked up after been triggered.

snow-jacket.name: Snow Jacket
snow-jacket.description: A thick, high visibility Jacket. It will help keep you warm in any climate.

snow-machine.name: Snow Machine
snow-machine.description: A machine which will blanket the surrounding terrain in snow.

snowball-gun.name: Snowball Gun
snowball-gun.description: Load snowballs and lay waste to your foes with Christmas cheer.

snowman.name: Snowman
snowman.description: Get into the holiday spirit with this decorative snowman

snowman-helmet.name: Snowman Helmet
snowman-helmet.description: A snowman helmet which provides ample protection.

snowmobile.name: Snowmobile
snowmobile.description: A custom snowmobile, made of various bits and pieces.

soccer-ball.name: Soccer Ball
soccer-ball.description: A deployable soccer ball. Kick it around for fun with other players. A staple of Rust's recreational and social activities.

soda-can-silencer.name: Soda Can Silencer
soda-can-silencer.description: Significantly reduces the sound of gunfire, and completely removes any visible muzzle flash. Crudely made out of a soda can, this will only survive a few shots.

sofa.name: Sofa
sofa.description: A comfortable old sofa. A decorative item which provides comfort and seats two.

sofa-pattern.name: Sofa - Pattern
sofa-pattern.description: A comfortable old sofa with a floral pattern. A decorative item which provides comfort and seats two.

sound-light.name: Sound Light
sound-light.description: A light that will pulse in time to music when connected to a Boom Box.

sousaphone.name: Sousaphone
sousaphone.description: A collection of used piping that’s been converted into a Tuba. Probably not very hygienic.

space-lr-300-assault-rifle.name: Space LR-300 Assault Rifle
space-lr-300-assault-rifle.description: Non-standard-issue high-powered light assault rifle for only the most elite of practitioners.

space-suit.name: Space Suit
space-suit.description: A spacesuit built for harsh conditions.

spas-12-shotgun.name: Spas-12 Shotgun
spas-12-shotgun.description: SPAS-12 Shotgun — reliable semi-automatic military shotgun. Uses 12 gauge ammo. Crafting, ammo & recycle. RustLab.

speargun.name: Speargun
speargun.description: A speargun which can only be fired underwater. Excellent for hunting Sharks.

speargun-spear.name: Speargun Spear
speargun-spear.description: Speargun Spear: Underwater ammo for the Speargun. Effective against sharks and underwater targets. RustLab.

speech-bubble-balloon.name: Speech Bubble Balloon
speech-bubble-balloon.description: A speech bubble-shaped balloon to use as decoration and for you to celebrate. You can write on it.

spider-webs.name: Spider Webs
spider-webs.description: Giant Cobwebs which can be hung against both a ceiling and a wall.

splitter.name: Splitter
splitter.description: Takes a single power input and divides it equally across up to three output lines. Each output receives one third of the input power.

spoiled-bear-meat.name: Spoiled Bear Meat
spoiled-bear-meat.description: Spoiled Bear Meat. Consuming will damage your health.

spoiled-big-cat-meat.name: Spoiled Big Cat Meat
spoiled-big-cat-meat.description: Spoiled Big Cat Meat. Consuming will damage your health.

spoiled-chicken.name: Spoiled Chicken
spoiled-chicken.description: Spoiled Chicken. Eating it will damage your health.

spoiled-crocodile-meat.name: Spoiled Crocodile Meat
spoiled-crocodile-meat.description: Spoiled Crocodile Meat. Consuming will damage your health.

spoiled-deer-meat.name: Spoiled Deer Meat
spoiled-deer-meat.description: Spoiled Deer Meat. Consuming will damage your health.

spoiled-fish-meat.name: Spoiled Fish Meat
spoiled-fish-meat.description: Spoiled Fish Meat. Consuming will damage your health.

spoiled-horse-meat.name: Spoiled Horse Meat
spoiled-horse-meat.description: Spoiled Horse Meat. Consuming will damage your health.

spoiled-human-meat.name: Spoiled Human Meat
spoiled-human-meat.description: Spoiled Human Meat. Consuming will damage your health.

spoiled-pork-meat.name: Spoiled Pork Meat
spoiled-pork-meat.description: Spoiled Pork Meat. Consuming will damage your health.

spoiled-produce.name: Spoiled Produce
spoiled-produce.description: A spoiled fruit or vegetable. It's so far gone it's hard to tell what it originally was.

spoiled-snake-meat.name: Spoiled Snake Meat
spoiled-snake-meat.description: Spoiled Snake Meat. Consuming will damage your health.

spoiled-wolf-meat.name: Spoiled Wolf Meat
spoiled-wolf-meat.description: Spoiled Wolf Meat. Consuming will damage your health.

spooky-speaker.name: Spooky Speaker
spooky-speaker.description: Frighten your guests with creepy and spooky halloween sounds!

spot-light.name: Spot Light
spot-light.description: A spotlight you can orient with a hammer.

spray-can.name: Spray Can
spray-can.description: Use the Spray Can to leave Tags or reskin your items. Press [attack] to spray and [attack2] to reskin items.

sprinkler.name: Sprinkler
sprinkler.description: A small sprinkler that sprays water around it. Requires a hose connection to supply it with water.

star-balloon.name: Star Balloon
star-balloon.description: A star-shaped balloon to use as decoration and for you to celebrate. You can write on it.

star-tree-topper.name: Star Tree Topper
star-tree-topper.description: A golden star to top off your Christmas Tree

steering-wheel.name: Steering Wheel
steering-wheel.description: A lockable steering wheel for your modular boat with some suspiciously shaped handles.

stone-fireplace.name: Stone Fireplace
stone-fireplace.description: A stone fireplace to heat your home. Must be placed indoors and against a wall.

stone-hatchet.name: Stone Hatchet
stone-hatchet.description: Primitive tool used for harvesting wood from trees and logs.

stone-pickaxe.name: Stone Pickaxe
stone-pickaxe.description: Primitive tool used for harvesting Stone, Metal ore and Sulfur ore.

stone-spear.name: Stone Spear
stone-spear.description: A stone-tipped wooden Spear. Slightly longer range.

stones.name: Stone
stones.description: Gathered from rock nodes scattered across the map and by picking up loose stones from the ground. A core building material used in stone-tier construction and many crafting recipes.

storage-adaptor.name: Storage Adaptor
storage-adaptor.description: Attach to a storage container to allow industrial input/output connections.

storage-barrel-horizontal.name: Storage Barrel Horizontal
storage-barrel-horizontal.description: Keep your things in this wooden barrel. Stores up to 48 items. Cannot be locked.

storage-barrel-vertical.name: Storage Barrel Vertical
storage-barrel-vertical.description: Keep your things in this wooden barrel. Stores up to 48 items. Cannot be locked.

storage-monitor.name: Storage Monitor
storage-monitor.description: The Storage Monitor attaches to the Tool Cupboard and Large Storage Box to monitor the container contents. Output sends a pulse when the container is updated.

strobe-light.name: Strobe Light
strobe-light.description: A flashing light, 3 speeds. Causes seizures.

sulfur.name: Sulfur
sulfur.description: Produced by smelting Sulfur Ore in a furnace. Combined with Charcoal at a ratio of 2:3 to produce Gun Powder, making it the backbone of all explosive and ammo crafting.

sulfur-ore.name: Sulfur Ore
sulfur-ore.description: Mined from yellow sulfur ore nodes. Smelt it in a furnace to produce Sulfur, which is the key ingredient for Gun Powder and all explosives.

sunflower.name: Sunflower
sunflower.description: A wild sunflower. Harvest for sunflower seeds which can be planted and grown to produce more.

sunflower-clone.name: Sunflower Clone
sunflower-clone.description: A clipping of a sunflower plant.

sunflower-seed.name: Sunflower Seed
sunflower-seed.description: Sunflower seeds can be found when picking wild Sunflowers.

sunglasses.name: Sunglasses
sunglasses.description: A pair of sunglasses. Functional and stylish!

sunken-combat-knife.name: Sunken Combat Knife
sunken-combat-knife.description: A corroded sunken knife designed for close combat engagements, can attack while sprinting. Best in class at harvesting flesh.

super-serum.name: Super Serum
super-serum.description: Super Serum,  more ore, more wood, more scrap

super-stocking.name: SUPER Stocking
super-stocking.description: A SUPER Stocking. Hang it by a fire and you might just get an awesome gift!

supply-signal.name: Supply Signal
supply-signal.description: Purple signal smoke. Use to mark a location for an airdrop.

surgeon-scrubs.name: Surgeon Scrubs
surgeon-scrubs.description: A bloody surgeon outfit. Protects your entire body and provides good protection while giving off a creepy halloween vibe.

survey-charge.name: Survey Charge
survey-charge.description: Use this on the terrain to see which resources are available for mining.

survival-fish-trap.name: Survival Fish Trap
survival-fish-trap.description: Traps fish, place on the shore and load with bait. The more bait loaded the bigger the chance of catching Trout.

survivors-pie.name: Survivor's Pie
survivors-pie.description: It's people. Survivor's pie is made out of people. Provides a boost to health, hunger and hydration. Increases yield when harvesting corpses for a short time.

switch.name: Switch
switch.description: A simple manual toggle switch that passes or blocks power on demand. Clicking it in-game or activating it via wire toggles the electrical flow to all connected outputs.

t-shirt.name: T-Shirt
t-shirt.description: A tshirt, simple undergarment. Good protection from damage and the elements.

table.name: Table
table.description: Every home needs a table. A decorative item which provides comfort when in close proximity.

tactical-gloves.name: Tactical Gloves
tactical-gloves.description: Military issue tactical gloves provide protection as well as weapon stabilization leading to higher accuracy when used.

tall-picture-frame.name: Tall Picture Frame
tall-picture-frame.description: A tall canvas for artists paintings.

tall-weapon-rack.name: Tall Weapon Rack
tall-weapon-rack.description: Artfully display your arsenal with a handcrafted wall-mounted weapon rack.

tank-top.name: Tank Top
tank-top.description: A tank top, comes with free stains. Basic protection, but better than nothing.

targeting-attachment.name: Targeting Attachment
targeting-attachment.description: An internal weapon mod that allows the user to send pings to their team while the weapon is equipped.

targeting-computer.name: Targeting Computer
targeting-computer.description: A sophisticated targeting module found only in elite crates or obtained by recycling top-tier automated defenses. Required for advanced automated weapons and surveillance systems.

tarp.name: Tarp
tarp.description: A durable sheet of canvas-like material looted from barrels. Required for crafting basic shelter and sleeping equipment.

taxi-vehicle-module.name: Taxi Vehicle Module
taxi-vehicle-module.description: Single module seating for two passengers, with protection at the front.

teal.name: Teal
teal.description: A rocking chair that responds to your input. Don't fire whilst seated.

tech-trash.name: Tech Trash
tech-trash.description: A collection of random tech parts.

telephone.name: Telephone
telephone.description: Use the telephone to call other telephones on the island!

tesla-coil.name: Tesla Coil
tesla-coil.description: An electrical trap that zaps nearby players when powered. More power supplied will result in higher damage. Loses durability with use.

test-generator.name: Test Generator
test-generator.description: A Mailbox that accepts notes. Only you can access the mail due to a one way slit.

thompson.name: Thompson
thompson.description: Classic SMG with decent damage. A common T2 choice before obtaining rifles.

tiger-mask.name: Tiger Mask
tiger-mask.description: A special tiger mask to celebrate Chinese New Year

timed-explosive-charge.name: Timed Explosive Charge
timed-explosive-charge.description: Timed Explosive Charge (C4): Attaches to structures and detonates after a short delay. 550 sulfur to craft. RustLab.

timer.name: Timer
timer.description: Automatically sends a timed power pulse to connected outputs. Configure the on-time and off-time intervals to automate lights, traps, or alert systems.

tin-can-alarm.name: Tin Can Alarm
tin-can-alarm.description: A primitive perimeter alarm made from hanging tin cans. Clatters loudly when disturbed, alerting you to any trespassers. Simple but effective.

torch.name: Torch
torch.description: A Torch. Lights your way at night and can be used as a weapon.

torch-holder.name: Torch Holder
torch-holder.description: A wall mounted holder for torches.

torpedo.name: Torpedo
torpedo.description: A torpedo for use in a submarine. Fires ahead in a straight line.

tree-lights.name: Tree Lights
tree-lights.description: A tree isn't complete without colorful lights!

triangle-planter-box.name: Triangle Planter Box
triangle-planter-box.description: A triangle planter with enough room to plant 4 seeds.

triangle-rail-road-planter.name: Triangle Rail Road Planter
triangle-rail-road-planter.description: A triangle planter with enough room to plant 4 seeds.

trike.name: Trike
trike.description: A rideable tricycle. Slower than a motorbike but more stable. Seats one player.

tripod-spot-light.name: Tripod Spot Light
tripod-spot-light.description: A spotlight you can orient with a hammer.

tuna-can-lamp.name: Tuna Can Lamp
tuna-can-lamp.description: A makeshift wall light. Still smells faintly of fish.

twitch-rivals-2025-sofa.name: Twitch Rivals 2025 Sofa
twitch-rivals-2025-sofa.description: A comfortable twitch branded sofa. A decorative item which provides comfort and seats two.

twitch-rivals-flag.name: Twitch Rivals Flag
twitch-rivals-flag.description: A wearable flag for Twitch Rivals

twitch-rivals-hazmat-suit.name: Twitch Rivals Hazmat Suit
twitch-rivals-hazmat-suit.description: A purple hazmat suit made from radiation resistant rubber.

twitch-rivals-neon-sign.name: Twitch Rivals Neon Sign
twitch-rivals-neon-sign.description: A Twitch Rivals Light-Up Neon Sign

twitch-rivals-trophy.name: Twitch Rivals Trophy
twitch-rivals-trophy.description: A trophy dedicated to the survivors of Rust Twitch Rivals

twitch-rivals-trophy-2023.name: Twitch Rivals Trophy 2023
twitch-rivals-trophy-2023.description: A trophy dedicated to the survivors of Rust Twitch Rivals 2023

two-sided-hanging-sign.name: Two Sided Hanging Sign
two-sided-hanging-sign.description: A double sided hanging sign, to attach to buildings.

two-sided-ornate-hanging-sign.name: Two Sided Ornate Hanging Sign
two-sided-ornate-hanging-sign.description: A double sided hanging sign, to attach to buildings.

two-sided-town-sign-post.name: Two Sided Town Sign Post
two-sided-town-sign-post.description: A double sided town sign post, with roof, that you can plant into terrain.

unused-storage-barrel-vertical.name: Unused Storage Barrel Vertical
unused-storage-barrel-vertical.description: Keep your things in this wooden storage box. Stores up to 48 items.

vampire-stake.name: Vampire Stake
vampire-stake.description: A stake with special properties able to release the soul of undead creatures with a single strike, and yield extra loot from remains.

variable-zoom-scope.name: Variable Zoom Scope
variable-zoom-scope.description: A large military-grade scope that can be configured from 4x zoom to 16x zoom.

vending-machine.name: Vending Machine
vending-machine.description: Trade your goods with other players by creating sell and buy orders. Accessible from outside the base without building privilege.

violet-boomer.name: Violet Boomer
violet-boomer.description: A very large mortar type firework with a violet starburst

violet-roman-candle.name: Violet Roman Candle
violet-roman-candle.description: A small repeating firework, shoots a series of Violet balls into the air

violet-volcano-firework.name: Violet Volcano Firework
violet-volcano-firework.description: Emits a beautiful shower of Violet sparks

wagon.name: Wagon
wagon.description: A train wagon car that runs on the underground rail system. Can be coupled with a locomotive.

walkie-talkie.name: Walkie Talkie
walkie-talkie.description: A walkie talkie set to an unknown channel

wall-cabinet.name: Wall Cabinet
wall-cabinet.description: A cabinet with a shelf for small items.

wallpaper-tool.name: Wallpaper Tool
wallpaper-tool.description: Transform your base with this wallpaper tool. Apply wallpaper on walls, floors and ceilings. Press secondary attack to select your skin.

wanted-poster.name: Wanted Poster
wanted-poster.description: A poster that can display a given player's face as wanted.

wanted-poster-2.name: Wanted Poster 2
wanted-poster-2.description: A poster that can display a given player's face as wanted.

wanted-poster-3.name: Wanted Poster 3
wanted-poster-3.description: A poster that can display a given player's face as wanted.

wanted-poster-4.name: Wanted Poster 4
wanted-poster-4.description: A poster that can display a given player's face as wanted.

water.name: Water
water.description: Water. Drinking it will alleviate your thirst.

water-barrel.name: Water Barrel
water-barrel.description: A storage container for water. Can output 10ml of water a second via a hose.

water-bucket.name: Water Bucket
water-bucket.description: A bucket for transporting water or other liquids.

water-gun.name: Water Gun
water-gun.description: A large water gun with pumpable pressure. Hold reload to pump!

water-jug.name: Water Jug
water-jug.description: A large jerry can for all kinds of water. Holds up to 5000ml. Careful not to throw it all away!

water-pistol.name: Water Pistol
water-pistol.description: A small water gun that doesn't require pumping, but has a lower range and output.

water-pump.name: Water Pump
water-pump.description: Can be placed in a water source to collect that water while powered. Can be connected to other Water entities.

water-purifier.name: Water Purifier
water-purifier.description: A Water Purifier. Place overtop of a campfire. Will provide clean, drinkable water from salty, or stagnant water.

waterpipe-shotgun.name: Waterpipe Shotgun
waterpipe-shotgun.description: The cheapest shotgun in Rust. Single-shot break-action that deals massive damage at point-blank. A staple first weapon for new and naked players.

waterwell-npc-jumpsuit.name: Waterwell NPC Jumpsuit
waterwell-npc-jumpsuit.description: A green jumpsuit and gasmask worn by the waterwell NPC

weapon-flashlight.name: Weapon flashlight
weapon-flashlight.description: Attaches to a weapon. Provides user with a beam of light. Pressing F (default) to toggle light.

weapon-lasersight.name: Weapon Lasersight
weapon-lasersight.description: Attaches to a weapon. Provides user with a guiding laser and reduces weapon sway.

weapon-rack-stand.name: Weapon Rack Stand
weapon-rack-stand.description: Holds weaponry haphazardly, a charmingly chaotic addition to your virtual armory.

wellipets-hat.name: Wellipets Hat
wellipets-hat.description: A hat made of wellipets boots

wetsuit.name: Wetsuit
wetsuit.description: A Wetsuit providing protection from frigid waters.

wheat.name: Wheat
wheat.description: A bundle of wheat. Edible, but better off in a cooking recipe.

wheat-clone.name: Wheat Clone
wheat-clone.description: A Clipping of a Wheat Plant.

wheat-seed.name: Wheat Seed
wheat-seed.description: Wheat Seeds can be planted in the ground or a planter box to grow additional wheat. Watering with large quantities of water speeds up growth.

wheelbarrow-piano.name: Wheelbarrow Piano
wheelbarrow-piano.description: The Piano is a repurposed wheelbarrow that weighs a ton, but makes up for it with a wide range of notes.

white-berry.name: White Berry
white-berry.description: A white berry. Can be eaten or used in mixing table recipes to create teas.

white-berry-clone.name: White Berry Clone
white-berry-clone.description: A clipping of a White Berry Plant.

white-berry-seed.name: White Berry Seed
white-berry-seed.description: White Berry Seeds can be planted in the ground or a planter box to grow additional food. Watering with large quantities of water speeds up growth.

white-volcano-firework.name: White Volcano Firework
white-volcano-firework.description: Emits a beautiful shower of white sparks

wicker-barrel.name: Wicker Barrel
wicker-barrel.description: Keep your things in this wicker barrel. Stores up to 48 items. Cannot be locked.

wide-weapon-rack.name: Wide Weapon Rack
wide-weapon-rack.description: Artfully display your arsenal with a handcrafted wall-mounted weapon rack.

wind-turbine.name: Wind Turbine
wind-turbine.description: A large wind-powered generator that produces up to 149W of electricity. Output varies with wind speed and is reduced when placed near structures or terrain.

wire-tool.name: Wire Tool
wire-tool.description: A tool for making connections between electrical objects. Aim at an input/output handle and click another handle to form a connection.

wolf-headdress.name: Wolf Headdress
wolf-headdress.description: A headdress made out of the scraped out head of a wolf.

wood.name: Wood
wood.description: The most abundant resource on the island. Chopped from trees and stumps using a hatchet or chainsaw. Essential for building wooden structures, crafting basic items, and fueling furnaces.

wood-armor-gloves.name: Wood Armor Gloves
wood-armor-gloves.description: Gloves made out of wood and leather, offers some protection to the upper body.

wood-armor-helmet.name: Wood Armor Helmet
wood-armor-helmet.description: A shoddy helmet made from simple materials, provides some basic protection from melee and ranged attacks.

wood-armor-pants.name: Wood Armor Pants
wood-armor-pants.description: A shoddy piece of leg armor made from simple materials, provides some basic protection from melee and ranged attacks.

wood-chestplate.name: Wood Chestplate
wood-chestplate.description: A shoddy piece of body armor made from simple materials, provides some basic protection from melee and ranged attacks.

wood-mirror-standing.name: Wood Mirror Standing
wood-mirror-standing.description: A standing wooden frontier themed mirror

wood-storage-box.name: Wood Storage Box
wood-storage-box.description: Keep your things in this wooden storage box. Stores up to 18 items.

wooden-armor-insert.name: Wooden Armor Insert
wooden-armor-insert.description: Wood insert for crafted clothes and armor, provides some extra protection from bullets and melee.

wooden-arrow.name: Wooden Arrow
wooden-arrow.description: An arrow for a Hunting Bow and Crossbow.

wooden-cross.name: Wooden Cross
wooden-cross.description: A wooden cross marking the remains of an unknown soul

wooden-floor-spikes.name: Wooden Floor Spikes
wooden-floor-spikes.description: A set of spikes that will slow down and hurt anyone that walks over them.

wooden-horse-armor.name: Wooden Horse Armor
wooden-horse-armor.description: A full body armor for a horse made of wood. Provides moderate protection for you and your steed, but with a reduction in movement speed.

wooden-shield.name: Wooden Shield
wooden-shield.description: A basic wooden shield, won't last very long. Usable with single handed weapons and tools.

wooden-spear.name: Wooden Spear
wooden-spear.description: Primitive weapon, perfect for hunting your foes. Can be upgraded to Stone Spear.

work-cart.name: Work Cart
work-cart.description: A service train designed to run on an underground rail system.

workbench-level-1.name: Workbench Level 1
workbench-level-1.description: This allows you to craft and unlock items requiring workbench level 1

workbench-level-2.name: Workbench Level 2
workbench-level-2.description: This allows you to craft and unlock items requiring workbench level 2

workbench-level-3.name: Workbench Level 3
workbench-level-3.description: This allows you to craft and unlock items requiring workbench level 3

worm.name: Worm
worm.description: A small, writhing worm that can be used for bait. Could also be eaten in desperate situations.

wrapping-paper.name: Wrapping Paper
wrapping-paper.description: Use this to conceal any item in a lazily wrapped gift

xl-picture-frame.name: XL Picture Frame
xl-picture-frame.description: An extra large canvas for artists paintings.

xor-switch.name: XOR Switch
xor-switch.description: Outputs power only when exactly one of its two inputs is active — not both, and not neither. Ideal for toggle logic where you want a state to flip based on one condition at a time.

xxl-picture-frame.name: XXL Picture Frame
xxl-picture-frame.description: A double extra large canvas for artists paintings.

xylobone.name: Xylobone
xylobone.description: A selection of bones that were “acquired” for their acoustic attributes. Play a lullaby for your camp with these soothing tones.

yellow-berry.name: Yellow Berry
yellow-berry.description: A yellow berry. Can be eaten or used in mixing table recipes to create teas.

yellow-berry-clone.name: Yellow Berry Clone
yellow-berry-clone.description: A clipping of a Yellow Berry Plant.

yellow-berry-seed.name: Yellow Berry Seed
yellow-berry-seed.description: Yellow Berry Seeds can be planted in the ground or a planter box to grow additional food. Watering with large quantities of water speeds up growth.

yellow-perch.name: Yellow Perch
yellow-perch.description: A Yellow Perch, commonly found in freshwater rivers.
